Malacia.name: Malacie
Malacia.description:
Prerequisite: Mind Trick

A creature de votre choix that you can see within range is overcome with a sense of dizziness and nausea, as you disturb its equilibrium with the Force. The creature must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or fall à terre, becoming incapacitated and unable to stand up for the duration.

At the end of each of its turns, and each time it takes dégâts, la cible can make another Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. La cible has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde if it's triggered by dégâts. On a success, the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Feedback.name: Retour
Feedback.description:
You unleash a burst of psychic energy at a target within range. If la cible can hear you (though it need not understand you), it must succeed on an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts and have disavantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d4]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d4]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d4]]).

Force Scream.name: Force Scream
Force Scream.description: You emit a scream imbued with the power of the Force. Each creature you choose within 15 mètres of you must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature take [[/r 4d6]] psychic dégâts, [[/r 4d6]] sonic dégâts, and is assourdi until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, it takes half as much dégâts and isn't assourdi.

Saber Dance.name: Danse du sabre
Saber Dance.description:
Prerequisite: Animate Weapon

A light- or vibro-weapon de votre choix that you are wearing or carrying begins to animate, spinning around your body at high speeds in a rayon de 3 mètres centered on you. For the duration, your vitesse de déplacement is halved, and the weapon moves with you.

When a creature enters the affected area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, la créature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 4d10]] dégâts of the weapon's type, or half as much dégâts on a successful jet de sauvegarde.

When this power ends, you can immediately recall the weapon to your hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the radius of the power increases to 15 mètres, and the power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Knight Speed.name: Vitesse du chevalier
Knight Speed.description:
Prérequis : Explosion de vitesse

Choisissez une créature volontaire que vous pouvez voir à portée. Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, la vitesse de la cible est doublée, elle gagne un bonus de +2 à la CA, elle a un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité, et elle gagne une action supplémentaire à chacun de ses tours. Cette action ne peut être utilisée que pour effectuer l'action Attaque (une seule attaque d'arme), Se précipiter, Se désengager, Se cacher ou Utiliser un objet.

Lorsque le pouvoir prend fin, la cible ne peut plus bouger ou entreprendre des actions avant son prochain tour, alors qu'une vague de léthargie l'envahit.

Force Concealment.name: Force Concealment
Force Concealment.description:
Vous enveloppez ou modifiez l'aura d'une créature ou d'un objet que vous contactez afin que le pouvoir de la Forces révèle de fausses informations à son sujet. La cible peut être une créature volontaire ou un objet qui n'est pas transporté ou porté par une autre créature.

Lorsque vous lancez le pouvoir, choisissez l'un ou les deux effets suivants. L'effet dure toute la durée. Si vous lancez ce pouvoir sur la même créature ou objet tous les jours pendant 30 jours, en lui appliquant le même effet à chaque fois, l'effet dure jusqu'à ce qu'il soit dissipé.

Fausse Aura. Vous modifiez la façon dont la cible apparaît face aux pouvoirs et aux effets améliorés basés sur la Force, tels que sense force, qui détecte la présence de la Force. Vous pouvez faire en sorte qu'un objet ou une créature non améliorée basée sur la Force apparaisse améliorée et qu'elle rayonne une aura de Force, ou qu'un objet ou une créature améliorée basée sur la Force apparaisse non améliorée et ne rayonne aucune aura de Force. Lorsque vous utilisez cet effet sur un objet, vous pouvez rendre la fausse aura apparente à toute créature qui manipule l'objet.

Cloak. Vous pouvez modifier la façon dont l'affinité de la cible dans la Force apparaît au pouvoir force Sight. Par exemple, un Seigneur Sith doté d'un grand pouvoir dans le côté obscur de la Force peut apparaître comme ayant très peu de force dans la Force, avec une affinité pour le côté lumineux.

Master Force Barrier.name: Master Force Barrier
Master Force Barrier.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Force Barrier

This power massively bolsters your allies with toughness and resolve. Creatures de votre choix in a rayon de 9 mètres around you when you cast this power gain the following benefits:

  • The creature sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre.
  • The creature has avantage on all jet de sauvegardes
  • Other creatures have disavantage on attack rolls against them.
  • When a dark side creature hits them with a attaque au corps à corps, cette créature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be aveuglé until the power ends.

Wall Run.name: Cours au mur
Wall Run.description: Jusqu'à la fin du tour, vous disposez d'une vitesse de montée égale à votre vitesse de marche et vous avez un avantage sur les tests de Dextérité (Acrobatie) et de Force (Athlétisme) qui impliquent du mouvement. Pendant la même durée, vous pouvez monter, descendre et traverser des surfaces verticales tout en gardant les mains libres. Cela ne vous permet pas de vous déplacer à l'envers le long des plafonds. Si vous êtes sur une surface verticale alors que vous n'avez plus de vitesse de montée, vous tombez immédiatement à moins que vous ne disposiez d'un autre moyen pour y rester.

Tremor.name: Tremblement
Tremor.description:
Prerequisite: Burst

You cause a tremor in the ground within range. Each creature other than you in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d8]] kinetic dégâts and is knocked à terre. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half as much dégâts and isn't knocked à terre. If the ground in that area is loose earth or stone, it becomes difficult terrain until cleared, with each 5-foot-diameter portion requiring at least 1 minute to clear by hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Heroism.name: Héroïsme
Heroism.description:
A willing creature you contact is imbued with bravery. Until the power ends, la créature is immune to being effrayé and gains points de vie temporaires equal to your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique at the start of each of its turns. When the power ends, la cible loses any remaining points de vie temporaires from this power. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 1st.

Aura of Purity.name: Aura de pureté
Aura of Purity.description:
Prerequisite: Restoration

Purifying energy radiates from you in a rayon de 9 mètres. Until the power ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. Each nonhostile creature in the aura (including you) can't become diseased, has resistance to poison dégâts, and has avantage on jet de sauvegardes against effects that cause any of the following conditions: aveuglé, charmé, assourdi, effrayé, paralysé, empoisonné, and étourdi.

Improved Dark Side Tendrils.name: Vrilles améliorées du côté obscur
Improved Dark Side Tendrils.description:
Prerequisite: Dark Side Tendrils

You summon a 20-foot-radius sphere of inky blackness at a point within range. No light, enhanced or otherwise, can illuminate the area, creatures fully within the area are aveuglé, and the area is difficult terrain. Any creature that starts its turn in the area takes [[/r 2d6]] necrotic dégâts. Any creature that ends its turn in the area must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 2d6]] poison dégâts as tendrils of dark energy caress it.

Comprehend Speech.name: Comprendre le discours
Comprehend Speech.description: Pour la durée, vous comprenez le sens littéral de toute langue parlée que vous entendez.

Plague.name: Peste
Plague.description:
Prerequisite: Affliction

Choose up to six creatures de votre choix in a 40-foot cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be affected by this power for the duration.

An affected target gains 1 slowed niveau, it takes a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes, and it can't use réactions. On its turn, it can use either an action or a action bonus, not both. Regardless of la créature's abilities or items, it can't make more than one melee or attaque à distance during its turn.

If la créature attempts to cast a power with a casting time of 1 action, roll a [[/r d20]]. On an 11 or higher, the power doesn't take effect until la créature's next turn, and la créature must use its action on that turn to complete the power. If it can't, the power is wasted.

A creature affected by this power makes another Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of its turn. On a successful sauvegarde, the effect ends for it.

Guidance.name: Conseils
Guidance.description:
You contact one willing creature. Once before the power ends, la cible can roll a [[/r d4]] and add the number rolled to one test de caractéristique of its choice. The power then ends.

This power's die increases at higher niveaus: to a [[/r d6]] at niveau 5, a [[/r d8]] at niveau 11, and a [[/r d10]] at niveau 17.

Sound Trick.name: Astuce sonore
Sound Trick.description:
Vous utilisez la Force pour produire un effet à portée. Vous créez l'un des effets spéciaux suivants à portée :

  • Votre voix résonne jusqu'à trois fois plus fort que d'habitude et vous pouvez modifier sa tonalité pendant 1 minute.
  • Vous provoquez des tremblements inoffensifs dans le sol pendant 1 minute.
  • Vous créez un un son instantané provenant d'un point de votre choix à portée, comme un grondement de tonnerre, le cri d'un oiseau ou des murmures menaçants. effet sensoriel instantané et inoffensif, tel que la chute de feuilles, un souffle de vent, le mouvement des vêtements de quelqu'un ou le scintillement de luminaires non améliorés à portée.

Une créature méfiante peut utiliser son action pour effectuer un test d'Intelligence (Enquête) par rapport à votre DD de sauvegarde de force, discernant que les effets sont illusoires en cas de succès.

Si vous lancez ce pouvoir plusieurs fois, vous pouvez avoir jusqu'à trois de ses effets d'une minute actifs à la fois, et vous pouvez ignorer un tel effet comme une action.

Force Disarm.name: Force Disarm
Force Disarm.description: You select a weapon or object being worn or carried by a Large or smaller creature within range. The creature must make a Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la créature chooses the ability to use). If the item is being carried, this sauvegarde is made with avantage. On a failed sauvegarde, the item is pulled directly to you. If you have a free hand, you catch the weapon. Otherwise, it lands at your mètres.

Vitality Shield.name: Bouclier de vitalité
Vitality Shield.description:
Prerequisite: Force Body

You siphon some of your own vitality to create a barrier in the Force around yourpersonnelle. You take [[/r 2d8]] true dégâts, and gain a number of points de vie temporaires equal to twice the amount of dégâts you took. If this dégâts would reduce your points de vie to 0, the power fails. While you have these points de vie temporaires, you have avantage on Strength, Dexterity and Constitution jet de sauvegardes. Any remaining points de vie temporaires are lost when this power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the true dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Battlemind.name: Esprit de bataille
Battlemind.description:
Prerequisite: Battle Precognition

Through the Force, you gain a limited form of telepathy that enables you to anticipate the moves of your opponents in combat. While you aren't wearing armor or wielding a shield, you gain a +2 AC bonus against attaque au corps à corpss and a +3 AC bonus against attaque à distances.

This AC bonus is not applied against attacks from droids, constructs, or creatures with resistance or immunity to psychic dégâts.

Master Speed.name: Vitesse maître
Master Speed.description:
Prérequis : Vitesse de chevalier

Choisissez jusqu'à deux créatures consentantes que vous pouvez voir à portée. Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, la vitesse de chaque cible est doublée, elle gagne un bonus de +2 à la CA, elle a un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité, et elle gagne une action supplémentaire à chacun de ses tours. Cette action ne peut être utilisée que pour effectuer l'action Attaque (une seule attaque d'arme), Se précipiter, Se désengager, Se cacher ou Utiliser un objet.

Lorsque le pouvoir prend fin, chaque cible ne peut plus bouger ou entreprendre d'actions avant son prochain tour, alors qu'une vague de léthargie la balaye.

Puissance de la Force. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement de force de De niveau 8 ou supérieur, vous pouvez cibler une créature supplémentaire pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur au 7.

Improved Feedback.name: Commentaires améliorés
Improved Feedback.description:
Prerequisite: Feedback

You unleash a blast of psychic energy at a target within range. If la cible can hear you (though it need not understand you), it must succeed on an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 3d6]] psychic dégâts and must immediately use its réaction, if available, to move as far as its speed allows away from you. The creature doesn't move into obviously dangerous ground, such as a fire or a pit. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes half as much dégâts and doesn't have to move away. A assourdi creature automatically succeeds on the sauvegarde.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Force Push/Pull.name: Force Push/Pull
Force Push/Pull.description:
You gain the minor ability to move or manipulate creatures and objects with the Force. You can exert fine control on objects with your telekinetic grip, such as manipulating a simple tool, opening a door or a container, stowing or retrieving an item from an open container, or pouring the contents from a vial. Alternatively, you can push or pull a creature or object you can see.

You use the Force to move a Medium or smaller creature or object not being worn or carried within range. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. An object automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature or object moves a number of mètres in a direction de votre choix based on its size. A Tiny creature or object can be moved up to 20 mètres, a Small creature or object can be moved up to 10 mètres, and a Medium creature or object can be moved up to 5 mètres. If at the end of this movement la créature or object strikes another creature or object, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. An object automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, they both take [[/r 1d4]] kinetic dégâts.

This power improves when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, you can move a Tiny creature or object up to 30 mètres, a Small creature or object up to 20 mètres, a Medium creature or object up to 10 mètres, and the power's dégâts increases to [[/r 2d4]] kinetic dégâts. At niveau 11, you can move a Small creature or object up to 30 mètres, a Medium creature up to 20 mètres, and the power's dégâts increases to [[/r 3d4]] kinetic dégâts. At niveau 17, you can move a Medium creature to up 30 mètres, and the power's dégâts increases to [[/r 4d4]] kinetic dégâts.

Mass Coerce Mind.name: Esprit de contrainte de masse
Mass Coerce Mind.description:
Prerequisite: Coerce Mind

You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and influence with the Force up to twelve creatures de votre choix that you can see within range and that can hear and understand you. Creatures that can't be charmé are immune to this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking la créature to harm itpersonnelle automatically negates the effect of the power.

Each target must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it pursues the course of action you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of action can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the power ends when the subject finishes what it was asked to do.

You can also specify conditions that will trigger a special activity during the duration. For example, you might suggest that a group of soldiers give all their money to the first beggar they meet. If the condition isn't met before the power ends, the activity isn't performed. If you or any of your companions dégâts a creature affected by this power, the power ends for cette créature. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a 7th-niveau force slot, the duration is 10 days. When you use an 8th-niveau force slot, the duration is 30 days. When you use a 9th-niveau force slot, the duration is a year and a day.

Lightning Charge.name: Charge de foudre
Lightning Charge.description:
You imbue your weapon with debilitating force lightning. As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and the lightning leaps from la cible to a different creature de votre choix that you can see within 5 mètres of it. The second creature takes lightning dégâts equal to your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts to la cible, and the lightning dégâts to the second creature increases to [[/r 1d8]] + your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Bestow Curse.name: Accorder la malédiction
Bestow Curse.description:
Prerequisite: Curse

You contact a creature, and cette créature must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or become cursed for the duration of the power. When you cast this power, choose the nature of the curse from the following options:

  • Choose one score de caractéristique. While cursed, la cible has disavantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes made with that score de caractéristique.
  • While cursed, la cible has disavantage on attack rolls against you.
  • While cursed, la cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde at the start of each of its turns. lf it fails, it wastes its action that turn doing nothing.
  • While la cible is cursed, your attacks and powers deal an extra [[/r 1d8]] necrotic dégâts to la cible.

A remove curse power ends this effect. At the GM's discretion, you may choose an alternative curse effect, but it should be no more powerful than those described above. The GM has final say on such a curse's effect. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. If you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the duration is concentration, up to 10 minutes. If you use a force slot of 5th Niveau or higher, the duration is 8 hours. If you use a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the duration is 24 hours. If you use a niveau 9 force slot, the power lasts until it is dispelled. Using a force slot of 5th Niveau or higher grants a duration that doesn't require concentration.

Force Leap.name: Force Leap
Force Leap.description: Until the end of your next turn, you can use your forcecasting score de caractéristique instead of your Strength score when you jump, and always count as having made a running start before jumping.

Earthquake.name: Tremblement de terre
Earthquake.description:
Prerequisite: Eruption

You create a seismic disturbance at a point on the ground that you can see within range. For the duration, an intense tremor rips through the ground in a 100-foot-radius circle centered on that point and shakes creatures and structures in contact with the ground in that area.

The ground in the area becomes difficult terrain. Each creature on the ground that is concentrating must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature's concentration is broken.

When you cast this power and at the end of each turn you spend concentrating on it, chaque créature on the ground in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

This power can have additional effects depending on the terrain in the area, as determined by the GM.

Fissures. Fissures open throughout the power's area at the start of your next turn after you cast the power. A total of [[/r 1d6]] such fissures open in locations chosen by the GM. Each is [[/r 1d10 * 10]] mètres deep, 10 mètres wide, and extends from one edge of the power's area to the opposite side. A creature standing on a spot where a fissure opens must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or fall in. A creature that successfully sauvegardes moves with the fissure's edge as it opens.

A fissure that opens beneath a structure causes it to automatically collapse (see below).

Structures. The tremor deals 50 kinetic dégâts to any structure in contact with the ground in the area when you cast the power and at the start of each of your turns until the power ends. If a structure drops to 0 points de vie, it collapses and potentially dégâtss nearby creatures. A creature within half the distance of a structure's height must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 5d6]] kinetic dégâts, is knocked à terre, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a DD 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action to escape. The GM can adjust the DD higher or lower, depending on the nature of the rubble. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half as much dégâts and doesn't fall à terre or become buried.

Force Sight.name: Force Sight
Force Sight.description:
Prerequisite: Sense Force

You shift your vision to see through use of the Force; colors fade and inanimate objects appear as shades of gray. For the duration, you gain the following benefits.

  • Living things glow with the power of the Force. Those with an affinity for the light side glow blue, those with an affinity for the dark side glow red, and those with no attunement to either side of the Force glow yellow. How bright they glow is determined by how strong their connection to the Force is.
  • You gain blindsight to 30 mètres.
  • You have avantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight against living targets within 30 mètres.

Mass Hysteria.name: Hystérie de masse
Mass Hysteria.description:
Prerequisite: Hysteria

Drawing on the deepest fears of a group of creatures, you create illusory creatures in their minds, manifesting their worst nightmares as an implacable threat visible only to them. Each creature in a 30-foot-radius sphere is effrayé for the duration of the power. At the end of each of the effrayé creature's turns, it must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 5d10]] psychic dégâts. On a successful sauvegarde, the power ends for cette créature. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Master Heal.name: Maître Guérisseur
Master Heal.description:
Prerequisite: Greater Heal

A wave of healing energy washes over la créature you contact. La cible regains all its points de vie. If la créature is charmé, effrayé, paralysé, or étourdi, the condition ends. If la créature is à terre, it can use its réaction to stand up. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Sense Shatterpoint.name: Point de rupture des sens
Sense Shatterpoint.description:
Prérequis : Battle Insight

Vous recherchez un aperçu plus approfondi des défenses d'une créature que vous pouvez voir à portée. Jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour, vous avez l'avantage sur vos deux prochains jets d'attaque contre la cible.

Land Stride.name: Foulée terrestre
Land Stride.description: You align yourpersonnelle with nature, making traversing natural environments far easier. For the duration, your movement and that of creatures de votre choix within 40 mètres of you can't be slowed by natural terrain, such as mud, rocky ground, vines, or tall grass. Climbing still costs double normal movement. A creature that receives this bonus leaves behind no traces of its passage.

Dun Moch.name: Dun Moch
Dun Moch.description:
You attempt to manipulate a creature into fighting you. One creature that you can see within range must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is drawn to you, compelled by your demands. For the duration, it has disavantage on attack rolls against creatures other than you, and must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde each time it attempts to move to a space that is more than 30 mètres away from you; if it succeeds on this jet de sauvegarde, this power doesn't restrict la cible's movement for that turn.

The power ends if you attack any other creature, if you cast a power cette cibles a hostile creature other than la cible, if a creature friendly to you dégâtss la cible or casts a harmful power on it, or if you end your turn more than 30 mètres away from la cible. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Kinetite.name: Kinétite
Kinetite.description:
Prerequisite: Sustained Lightning

A 5-foot-diameter sphere of compressed lightning appears in an unoccupied space de votre choix within range and lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 mètres of the sphere must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

As a action bonus, you can move the sphere up to 30 mètres. If you ram the sphere into a creature, cette créature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much dégâts on a successful one, and the sphere stops moving this turn.

When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 mètres tall and jump it across pits up to 10 mètres wide. The sphere ignites flammable objects not being worn or carried, and it sheds bright light in a rayon de 6 mètres and dim light for an additional 20 mètres.

Force Potency. When you cast this power with a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, both the lightning and kinetic dégâts increase by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Force Imbuement.name: Force Imbuement
Force Imbuement.description: The crystal inside of a simple lightweapon or the material of a simple vibroweapon or an improvised weapon you are holding is imbued with the power of the Force. For the duration, you can use your forcecasting ability instead of Strength for the attack and jet de dégâtss of attaque au corps à corpss using that weapon, and the weapon's dégâts die becomes [[/r 1d8]]. The weapon also becomes enhanced, if it isn't already, and you become proficient with it, if you aren't already. The power ends if you cast it again or if you let go of the weapon.

Horror.name: Horreur
Horror.description:
Prerequisite: Fear

You project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a cône de 9 mètres must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or drop whatever it is holding and become effrayé for the duration. This power has no effect on constructs or droids.

While effrayé by this power, a creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest

available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. If la créature ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have line of sight to you, la créature can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a successful sauvegarde, the power ends for cette créature.

Dark Aura.name: Aura sombre
Dark Aura.description:
Prerequisite: Hex

You manifest a mantle of malevolent dark side energy for the duration.

Until the power ends, any attack you make deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] necrotic dégâts quand vous contactez a creature within 10 mètres of you. Any creature that takes this dégâts can't regain points de vie jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

De plus, any creature de votre choix that you can see that starts its turn within 10 mètres of you gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the extra dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for for every two slot niveaus above 3rd.

Force Mend.name: Force Mend
Force Mend.description:
You contact a creature and stimulate its natural healing ability. La cible regains [[/r 4d8+15]] points de vie. For the duration of the power, la cible regains 1 point de vie at the start of each of its turns (10 points de vie each minute).

If la créature has a severed part you hold it to the stump, the power instantaneously causes the limb to knit to the stump.

This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Blinding.name: Force Blinding
Force Blinding.description:
You use the Force to emit a blinding flash of light from your hand. Roll [[/r 6d10]], the total is how many points de vie of creatures this power can effect. Creatures in a cône de 4,5 mètres originating from you are affected in ascending order of their current points de vie (ignoring inconscient creatures and creatures that can't see).

Starting with la créature that has the lowest current points de vie, chaque créature affected by this power is aveuglé until the power ends. Subtract chaque créature's points de vie from the total before moving on to la créature with the next lowest points de vie. A creature's points de vie must be equal to or less than the remaining total for la créature to be affected.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, roll an additional [[/r 2d10]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Improved Kinetite.name: Kinétite améliorée
Improved Kinetite.description:
Prerequisite: Kinetite

A 20-foot-radius sphere of compressed lightning springs into existence centered on a point you choose within range. The sphere remains for the power's duration. Each creature in the sphere when it appears or that ends its turn there must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts. The sphere's space is difficult terrain.

Until the power ends, you can use a action bonus on each of your turns to cause a bolt of lightning to leap from the center of the sphere toward une créature you choose within 60 mètres of the center. Make a ranged force attack. You have avantage on the attack roll if la cible is in the sphere. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 4d6]] lightning dégâts.

Creatures within 30 mètres of the sphere have disavantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made to listen.

Force Potency. When you cast this power with a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the dégâts increases for each of its effects by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Will of the Force.name: Volonté de la Force
Will of the Force.description:
You sublimate yourpersonnelle before the will of the Force, attempting to use it to affect change in the galaxy around you.

The basic use of this power is to duplicate any other light side or universal pouvoir de la Force of niveau 8 or lower. You don't need to meet any requirements in that power; it simply takes effect. Alternatively, you can create one of the following effects de votre choix:

  • You summon one object to you of up to 250,000 cr in value that isn't an enhanced item. The object can be no more than 300 mètres in any dimension, and it appears in an unoccupied space you can see on the ground.
  • You allow up to twenty creatures that you can see to regain all points de vie, and you end all effects on them described in the improved restoration power.
  • You grant up to ten creatures that you can see resistance to a type de dégâts you choose.
  • You grant up to ten creatures you can see immunity to a single power or other specific enhanced effect for 8 hours. For instance, you could make yourpersonnelle and all your companions immune to the Manifestation of Abeloth's Will ability.
  • You undo a single recent event by forcing a reroll of any roll made within the last round (including your last turn). Reality reshapes itpersonnelle to accommodate the new result. For example, will of the force could undo an opponent's successful sauvegarde, a foe's critical hit, or a friend's failed sauvegarde. You can force the reroll to be made with avantage or disavantage, and vous pouvez choisir whether to use the reroll or the original roll.

You might be able to achieve something beyond the scope of the above examples. State your wish to the DM as precisely as possible. The DM has great latitude

in ruling what occurs in such an instance; the greater the wish, the greater the likelihood that something goes wrong. This power might simply fail, the effect you desire might only be partly achieved, or you might suffer some unforeseen consequence as a result of how you worded the wish. For example, wishing that a villain were dead might propel you forward in time to a period when that villain is no longer alive, effectively removing you from the game. Similarly, wishing for a legendary enhanced item or artifact might instantly transport you to the presence of the item's current owner.

The stress of casting this power to produce any effect other than duplicating another power weakens you. After enduring that stress, each time you cast a power until you finish a repos long, you take [[/r 1d10]] necrotic dégâts per niveau of that power, which can't be reduced or prevented in any way. De plus, your Strength drops to 3, if it isn't 3 or lower already, for [[/r 2d4]] days. For each of those days that you spend resting and doing nothing more than light activity, your remaining recovery time decreases by 2 days. De plus, there is a 33 percent chance that you are unable to cast will of the force ever again if you suffer this stress. Finally, if you are reduced to 0 points de vie as a result of this necrotic dégâts, or at any point before you have fully recovered from the Strength reduction, you immediately die and cannot be resurrected as your body fades away, absorbed into the living Force.

Calm Emotions.name: Calmer les émotions
Calm Emotions.description:
Prerequisite: Sense Emotion

You attempt to suppress strong emotions in a group of people. Each humanoid in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde a creature can choose to fail this jet de sauvegarde if it wishes. If a creature fails its jet de sauvegarde, choose one of the following two effects.

  • You can suppress any effect causing a target to be charmé or effrayé. When this power ends, any suppressed effect resumes, provided that its duration has not expired in the meantime.
  • Vous pouvez faire a target indifferent about creatures de votre choix that it is hostile toward. This indifference ends if la cible is attacked or harmed by a power or if it witnesses any of its friends being harmed.

When the power ends, la créature becomes hostile again, unless the GM rules otherwise.

Force Immunity.name: Force Immunity
Force Immunity.description:
Une barrière immobile et légèrement scintillante surgit autour de vous et reste pour toute la durée. La barrière bouge avec vous. Tout pouvoir de la Force de niveau 3 ou inférieur lancé depuis l'extérieur de la barrière ne peut pas vous affecter, même si le pouvoir est lancé en utilisant un emplacement de force de niveau supérieur. Un tel pouvoir peut vous cibler, mais il n’a aucun effet sur vous. De même, la zone à l'intérieur de la barrière est exclue des zones affectées par de tels pouvoirs.

Force Potency. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement de force de niveau 5 ou supérieur, la barrière bloque les pouvoirs d'un niveau supérieur pour chaque niveau d'emplacement au-dessus du 4ème.

Hex.name: Hex
Hex.description:
You curse an opponent within range. Until the power ends, you deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] necrotic dégâts to la cible whenever you hit it with an attack. Also, choose one ability when you cast the power. La cible has disavantage on test de caractéristiques made with the chosen ability.

If la cible drops to 0 points de vie before this power ends, you can use a action bonus on a subsequent turn of yours to curse a new creature.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of 3rd or niveau 4, you can maintain your concentration on the power for up to 8 hours. When you use a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, you can maintain your concentration on the power for up to 24 hours.

Precognition.name: Préconnaissance
Precognition.description:
Prerequisite: Danger Sense

Your mastery of the Force gives you a limited ability to see into the immediate future. For the duration, you can't be surprised and you have avantage on attack rolls, test de caractéristiques, and jet de sauvegardes. De plus, other creatures have disavantage on attack rolls against you for the duration.

Sever Force.name: Sever Force
Sever Force.description:
You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a pouvoir de la Force. If la créature is casting a power of niveau 3 or lower, its power fails and has no effect. If it is casting a power of niveau 4 or higher, make an test de caractéristique using your forcecasting ability. The DD equals 10 + the power's niveau. On a success, la créature's power fails and has no effect.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the interrupted power has no effect if its niveau is less than or equal to the niveau of the force slot you used.

Drain Life.name: Vidanger la vie
Drain Life.description:
Prerequisite: Drain Vitality

You draw the life force from a creature you can see within range. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. La cible takes [[/r 8d8]] necrotic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. If you reduce a hostile creature to 0, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to half the dégâts dealt. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Spirit Blade.name: Boiteux spirituel
Spirit Blade.description:
You conjure a blade of spirit energy and attempt to strike une créature. Make a melee force attack against la cible. If the attack hits, la créature takes [[/r 1d10]] necrotic dégâts.

This power can make multiple attacks at higher niveaus: two attacks at niveau 5, three attacks at niveau 11, and four attacks at niveau 17. Each attack can target the same creature or different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each target.

Stasis.name: Stase
Stasis.description:
Prerequisite: Stun

Choose a creature that you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make another Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, you can target an additional creature for each slot niveau above 5th. The creatures must be within 30 mètres of each other when you target them.

Master Force Immunity.name: Master Force Immunity
Master Force Immunity.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Force Immunity

A 10-foot-radius faintly shimmering barrier surrounds you. Within the sphere, powers can't be cast and enhanced items become mundane. Until the power ends, the sphere moves with you, centered on you.

Powers and other enhanced effects are suppressed in the sphere and can't protrude into it. A slot expended to cast a suppressed power is consumed. While an effect is suppressed, it doesn't function, but the time it spends suppressed counts against its duration.

Targeted Effects. Powers and other enhanced effects cette cible a creature or an object in the sphere have no effect on cette cible.

Enhanced Areas. The area of another power or enhanced effect, such as force storm, can't extend into the sphere. If the sphere overlaps an enhanced area, the part of the area that is covered by the sphere is suppressed.

Powers. Any active power or other enhanced effect on a creature or an object in the sphere is suppressed while la créature or object is in it.

Enhanced Items. The properties and powers of enhanced items are suppressed in the sphere. For example, a +1 vibrosword in the sphere functions as an unenhanced vibrosword.

An enhanced weapon's properties and powers are suppressed if it is used against a target in the sphere or wielded by an attacker in the sphere. If an enhanced weapon or a piece of enhanced ammunition fully leaves the sphere (for example, if you fire an enhanced shot or throw an enhanced saberspear at a target outside the sphere), the enhancement of the item ceases to be suppressed as soon as it exits.

Enhanced Travel. Teleportation fails to work in the sphere, whether the sphere is the destination or the departure point for such enhanced travel. A portal to another location temporarily closes while in the sphere.

Creatures and Objects. A creature or object summoned or created by powers temporarily winks out of existence in the sphere. Such a creature instantly reappears once the space la créature occupied is no longer within the sphere.

Tech Override/Sever Force. Powers and enhanced effects such as sever force have no effect on the sphere. Likewise, the spheres created by different scrambling field powers don't nullify each other.

Sense Emotion.name: Ressentir l'émotion
Sense Emotion.description: You attune your senses to pick up the emotions of others for the duration. When you cast the power, and as your action on each turn until the power ends, you can focus your senses on one humanoid you can see within 30 mètres of you. You instantly learn la cible's prevailing emotion, whether it's love, anger, pain, fear, calm, or something else, and you have avantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks against la cible. If la cible isn't actually humanoid or it is immune to being charmé, you sense that it is calm.

Battle Precognition.name: Précognition de bataille
Battle Precognition.description: Votre harmonisation avec la Force vous avertit lorsque vous êtes sur le point d'entrer en danger. Jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir, votre CA de base devient 13 + votre modificateur de Dextérité. Ce pouvoir n'a aucun effet si vous portez une armure.

Improved Revitalize.name: Revitalisation améliorée
Improved Revitalize.description:
Prerequisite: Revitalize

You return a dead creature you contact to life, provided that it has been dead no longer than 1 hour. If la créature's soul is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the body, la créature returns to life with all its points de vie. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

This power also neutralizes any poisons and cures diseases that affected la créature at the time it died.

This power closes all mortal wounds and restores any missing body parts.

Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. La cible takes a -4 penalty to all attack rolls, jet de sauvegardes, and test de caractéristiques. Every time la cible finishes a repos long, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears.

True Sight.name: Vraie vue
True Sight.description:
Prerequisite: Force Sight

You shift your vision to see through use of the Force,

giving you the ability to see things as they actually are. For the duration, you have truesight and notice secret doors hidden by powers, all out to a range of 120 mètres.

Share Life.name: Partager la vie
Share Life.description:
Prerequisite: Give Life

You sacrifice some of your health to mend another creature's injuries. You take [[/r 4d8]] necrotic dégâts, and une créature de votre choix that you can see within range regains a number of points de vie equal to twice the necrotic dégâts you take. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Battle Meditation.name: Méditation de combat
Battle Meditation.description:
You exude an aura out to 5 mètres that boosts the morale and overall battle prowess of you and your allies while simultaneously reducing the opposition's combat-effectiveness by eroding their will to fight.

Whenever you or a friendly creature within your meditation makes an attack roll or a jet de sauvegarde, they can roll a [[/r d4]] and add the number rolled to the attack roll or jet de sauvegarde.

Whenever a hostile creature enters your meditation or starts its turn there, it must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the number rolled from each attack roll or jet de sauvegarde it makes before the end of your next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, it is immune to this power for 1 day.

Sonic Charge.name: Charge sonique
Sonic Charge.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and you begin to emanate a disturbing hum jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If a hostile creature ends its turn within 5 mètres of you, it takes [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] sonic dégâts to la cible, and the secondary dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] and [[/r 1d4]], respectively, at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Force Lightning.name: Force Lightning
Force Lightning.description:
Prerequisite: Shock

A stroke of lightning forming a line 100 mètres long and 5 mètres wide blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

The lightning ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Insanity.name: Folie
Insanity.description:
Prerequisite: Horror

This power assaults and twists creatures' minds, spawning delusions and provoking uncontrolled action. Each creature in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on you must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde when you cast this power or be affected by it.

An affected target can't take réactions and must roll a [[/r d8]] at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn. This power has no effect on constructs or droids.

|[[/r d8]]|Behavior|

|:--:|:--|

|1| The creature uses all its movement to move in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a [[/r d8]] and assign a direction to each die face. The creature doesn't take an action this turn.|

|2-6| The creature doesn't move or take actions this turn.|

|7-8|The creature uses its action to make a attaque au corps à corps against a randomly determined creature within its reach. If there is no creature within its reach, la créature does nothing this turn.|

At the end of each of its turns, an affected target can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. If it succeeds, this effect ends for cette cible.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a power slot of niveau 6 or higher, the radius of the sphere increases by 5 mètres for each force slot niveau above 5th.

Phasewalk.name: Phase de marche
Phasewalk.description: You teleport up to 30 mètres to an unoccupied space that you can see.

Saber Assault.name: Assaut au sabre
Saber Assault.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Ward

The first time you take the Attack action during your turn, you can simultaneously cast this power to blend your attaque d'arme au corps à corpss with the use of the Force. For each successful hit you make with a melee weapon before the power ends, la cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or have a new effect apply until the end of its next turn. Once you've made three attaque d'armes, the power ends.

  • 1st Hit: If la cible fails its jet de sauvegarde, it gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn.
  • 2nd Hit: If la cible fails its jet de sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts and cannot take réactions until after the end of its next turn.
  • 3rd Hit: If la cible fails its jet de sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts and cannot take action bonuss during its next turn.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts of the second and third hit each increase by [[/r 1d6]] for every two slot niveaus above 1st.

Hysteria.name: Hystérie
Hysteria.description:
Prerequisite: Hallucination

You tap into the nightmares of a creature you can see within range and create an illusory manifestation of its deepest fears, visible only to cette créature. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or become effrayé for the duration. At the end of each of la cible's turns before the power ends, la cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 4d10]] psychic dégâts. On a successful sauvegarde, the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a pouvoir de la Force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Improved Phasestrike.name: Frappe de phase améliorée
Improved Phasestrike.description:
Prerequisite: Phasestrike

Choose up to five creatures you can see within range. Make a melee force attack against each one. On hit, a target takes [[/r 6d10]] force dégâts. You can then teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 mètres of one of la créatures you chose.

Master Malacia.name: Maître Malacia
Master Malacia.description:
Prerequisite: Mass Malacia

Choose une créature that you can see within range. The creature reels with extreme dizziness and nausea for the duration. Creatures that can't be charmé are immune to this power.

The affected creature must use all of its movement to writhe in discomfort without leaving its space and has disavantage on Dexterity jet de sauvegardes and attack rolls. While la cible is affected by this power, other creatures have avantage on attack rolls against it. As an action, an affected creature makes a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to regain control of itpersonnelle. On a successful sauvegarde, the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Locate Object.name: Localiser un objet
Locate Object.description: Describe or name an object. You sense the direction to the object's location, as long as its within 1000 mètres of you. If the object is in motion, you know the direction of its movement. The power can locate a specific object known to you, as long as you have seen it while within 30 mètres of it. Alternatively, the power can locate the nearest object of a particular kind. This power can't locate an object if any thickness of lead blocks a direct path between you and the object.

Convulsion.name: Convulsion
Convulsion.description:
Prerequisite: Tremor

Choose a point you can see on the ground within range. A fountain of churned earth and stone erupts in a 20-foot cube centered on that point. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d12]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, the ground in that area becomes difficult terrain until cleared. Each 5-foot-square portion of the area requires at least 1 minute to clear by hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d12]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Saber Reflect.name: Sabre Réflexion
Saber Reflect.description:
In response to being attacked, you raise your weapon to attempt to deflect. When you use this power, the dégâts you take from the attack is reduced by [[/r 1d6]]. If you reduce the dégâts to 0, you're wielding a lightweapon or vibroweapon, and the dégâts is energy or ion, you can reflect the attack at a target within range as part of the same réaction. Make a ranged force attack at a target you can see. The attack has a normal range of 20 mètres and a long range of 60 mètres. En cas de contacter, la cible takes the triggering attack's normal dégâts.

The power's dégâts reduction increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Sanctuary.name: Sanctuaire
Sanctuary.description:
Until the power ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack, a harmful power, or a hostile action must first make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature must choose a new target or lose the attack or power. This power doesn't protect the warded creature from area effects.

If the warded creature makes an attack, casts a power that affects an enemy creature, or takes a hostile action this power ends.

Death Field.name: Champ de la mort
Death Field.description:
Prerequisite: Siphon Life

You draw the life force from every creature in a 30-foot cube centered on a point you choose within range. Each creature in that area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d8]] necrotic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. If you reduce a hostile creature to 0 points de vie, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to half the dégâts dealt. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Affliction.name: Affliction
Affliction.description:
Prerequisite: Slow

Choose a creature that you can see within range. That creature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible gains 1 slowed niveau, it takes a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes, and it can't use réactions. On its turn, it can use either an action or a action bonus, not both. Regardless of la créature's abilities or items, it can't make more than one melee or attaque à distance during its turn.

If la créature attempts to cast a power with a casting time of 1 action, roll a [[/r d20]]. On an 11 or higher, the power doesn't take effect until la créature's next turn, and la créature must use its action on that turn to complete the power. If it can't, the power is wasted.

The creatures makes another Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of its turn. On a successful sauvegarde, the effect ends.

Sap Vitality.name: Sève Vitalité
Sap Vitality.description:
Make a melee force attack against a creature you can reach. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 3d10]] necrotic dégâts.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Breath Control.name: Contrôle de la respiration
Breath Control.description:
You are able to slow your metabolism in such a way that you can stop breathing and resist the effect of toxins in your body. If you are empoisonné, you neutralize the poison. If more than one poison afflicts you, you neutralize one poison that you know is present, or you neutralize one at random.

For the duration, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against being empoisonné, resistance to poison dégâts, and you no longer need to breathe.

Improved Force Scream.name: Improved Force Scream
Improved Force Scream.description:
Prerequisite: Force Scream

You emit a violent scream imbued with the power of the Force. Each creature you choose within 30 mètres of you must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a

failed sauvegarde, a creature take [[/r 5d6]] psychic dégâts, [[/r 5d6]] sonic dégâts, is assourdi until the end of its next turn, and is knocked à terre. On a successful sauvegarde, it takes half as much dégâts and isn't assourdi or knocked à terre.

Saber Onslaught.name: Assaut au sabre
Saber Onslaught.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Strike

You assume a battle stance. Until the end of your turn, your movement does not provoke attaque d'opportunités. De plus, whenever you move, you can make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps against chaque créature you move within 5 mètres of for the first time this turn. En cas de contacter, the attack deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts of the weapon's type, and la cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, vous pouvez choisir to either knock la cible à terre, or push it 5 mètres away from you.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the bonus weapon dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Necrotic Charge.name: Charge nécrotique
Necrotic Charge.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and vous pouvez choisir to deal up to [[/r 1d8]] of necrotic dégâts, which you suffer as well. This dégâts can't be reduced or negated in any way.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] necrotic dégâts to la cible, and you can increase the secondary dégâts to [[/r 2d8]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Dominate Beast.name: Dominer la bête
Dominate Beast.description:
A beast you can see must succeed on a Wisdom sauvegarde or be charmé. If you or your companions are fighting it, it has avantage on this jet de sauvegarde.

While it's charmé, you have a telepathic link to it if you're on the same planet. You can use this link to issue commands while you are conscious, no action required, which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action. If it completes the order and doesn't receive further orders, it focuses on defending itpersonnelle.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour take total control of la cible. Until the end of your next turn, the beast takes only the actions you decide and nothing you don't allow it to. You can also have the beast use a réaction, but this takes your réaction as well.

If the beast takes dégâts, it makes another Wisdom sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a 5th-niveau force slot, the duration is up to 10 minutes. At a 6th-niveau slot, the duration is up to 1 hour. At a slot of 7th or higher, the duration is up to 8 hours.

Give Life.name: Donner la vie
Give Life.description: Placing your hand on another creature you can transfer your own life force to them. You spend and roll one of your Hit Dice and la créature regains that many points de vie. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Improved Heal.name: Guérison améliorée
Improved Heal.description:
Prerequisite: Heal

A wave of healing energy washes out from a point de votre choix within range. Choose up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on that point. Each target regains points de vie equal to [[/r 3d8]] + your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 5th.

Disable Droid.name: Désactiver le droïde
Disable Droid.description:
Prerequisite: Stun Droid

Choose a point that you can see within range. Each droid or construct must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the beginning of each of its turns, an affected creature takes energy dégâts equal to your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique and then repeats this jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Phasestrike.name: Frappe de phase
Phasestrike.description:
Until the power ends, your movement doesn't provoke attaque d'opportunités.

Once before the power ends, you can give yourpersonnelle avantage on one attaque d'arme roll on your turn. That attack deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] force dégâts on a hit. Whether you hit or miss, your walking speed increases by 30 mètres until the end of that turn.

Control Pain.name: Contrôler la douleur
Control Pain.description:
Prerequisite: Force Body

You use the Force to push your body beyond its normal limits. You can't die from dégâts or from failed death jet de sauvegardes while this power is in effect, but the effort taxes you. If you have 0 points de vie while you are under the effect of this power, you do not fall inconscient, and continue acting and fighting normally. While you remain at 0 points de vie, you must make a death jet de sauvegarde at the start of each of your turns. Each time you fail a death jet de sauvegarde, you suffer a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls, test de caractéristiques, and jet de sauvegardes (including death jet de sauvegardes). This penalty lasts until you regain points de vie. Successful death jet de sauvegardes have no effect, but a natural 20 restores 1 point de vie as usual.

If you have 0 points de vie when this power ends, you die instantly.

Heal.name: Guérir
Heal.description:
A creature you contact regains a number of points de vie equal to [[/r 1d8]] + your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the healing increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Wound.name: Bénieur
Wound.description:
You make a piercing gesture at a creature within range. Make a ranged force attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 2d8]] necrotic dégâts and must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is also empoisonné jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Greater Kinetite.name: Grande Kinétite
Greater Kinetite.description:
Prerequisite: Kinetite

A 5-foot diameter sphere of compressed lightning appears in an unoccupied space de votre choix and lasts for the duration. Each creature within 5 mètres of the sphere when the power is cast must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 5d8]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

As a action bonus on each of your turns, you can move the ball of lightning up to 30 mètres vertically or horizontally. If you ram the sphere into a creature, cette créature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 5d8]] kinetic dégâts (or half as much dégâts on a success), and the sphere stops moving this turn. A creature takes half as dégâts on a successful Dexterity jet de sauvegarde.

Force Potency. When you cast this power with a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, both the lightning and kinetic dégâts increase by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 5th.

Force Shunt.name: Force Shunt
Force Shunt.description:
You use the Force to thrust a creature you can see to the ground. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d4]] kinetic dégâts and falls à terre.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d4]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d4]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d4]]).

Burst.name: Éclatement
Burst.description:
You cause the earth to burst from beneath your mètres. Each creature within range, other than you, must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d8]] kinetic dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Saber Throw.name: Lancer de sabre
Saber Throw.description:
As a part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a ranged force attack with a lightweapon or vibroweapon against une cible within the power's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts. The weapon then immediately returns to your hand.

This power can hit multiple targets when you reach higher niveaus: two targets at niveau 5, three targets at niveau 11, and four targets at niveau 17. Each target must be within 30 mètres of the previous target, you must make a separate attack roll for each target, and the last target must be no further than 30 mètres away from you. You can not hit the same target twice in succession.

Psychometry.name: Psychométrie
Psychometry.description:
Prérequis : Télémétrie

Pour la durée, vous gagnez la capacité de « communiquer » par télépathie avec les objets inanimés que vous contactez. Vous pouvez poser jusqu'à cinq questions et recevoir des réponses d'objets, généralement sous la forme d'une hallucination auditive ou visuelle. Par exemple, contacter les restes rouillés et brisés d'un sabre laser et demander comment il est arrivé là peut entraîner une brève vision d'un chevalier Jedi mécontent le jetant au sol à cet endroit. Un objet ainsi « interrogé » ne peut fournir que des informations relatives à son passé. Le DM a le dernier mot sur les objets qui peuvent être interrogés et dans quelle mesure.

Master Feedback.name: Commentaires du Maître
Master Feedback.description:
Prerequisite: Greater Feedback

You unleash the power of your mind to blast the intellect of up to ten creatures de votre choix that you can see within range. Creatures that have an Intelligence score of 2 or lower are unaffected.

Each target must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a target takes [[/r 14d6]] psychic dégâts and is étourdi. On a successful sauvegarde, a target takes half as much dégâts and isn't étourdi.

A étourdi target can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. On a successful sauvegarde, the stunning effect ends.

Shroud of Darkness.name: Linceul des ténèbres
Shroud of Darkness.description:
Prerequisite: Darkness

You become heavily obscured to others. Dim light within 10 mètres of you becomes darkness, and bright light becomes dim light.

Until the power ends, you have resistance to force dégâts. De plus, whenever a creature within 10 mètres of you hits you with an attack, it takes [[/r 2d8]] necrotic dégâts.

Crush.name: Écraser
Crush.description:
Prerequisite: Choke

You make a crushing gesture at a creature within range. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde target takes [[/r 10d8]] force dégâts and is paralysé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes half as much dégâts and is not paralysé.

You can use a action bonus while la cible is paralysé to move la cible up to 10 mètres in any direction.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 6th.

Beacon of Hope.name: Une lueur d'espoir
Beacon of Hope.description:
Prérequis : Héroïsme

Ce pouvoir confère espoir et vitalité. Choisissez n'importe quel nombre de créatures à portée. Pendant toute la durée, chaque cible a un avantage sur les jets de sauvegarde de Sagesse et les jets de sauvegarde de mort, et récupère le nombre maximum de points de vie possible grâce à n'importe quel soin.

Mass Malacia.name: Masse Malacie
Mass Malacia.description:
Prerequisite: Malacia

Each creature in a 30-foot cube within range must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature becomes charmé for the duration. While charmé by this power, la créature is incapacitated and has a speed of 0.

The power ends for an affected creature if it takes any dégâts or if someone else uses an action to shake la créature out of its stupor. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Body.name: Force Body
Force Body.description:
Ce pouvoir vous permet d'utiliser votre santé pour alimenter votre pouvoir de la Forces. Pendant la durée, lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir de la Force, vous pouvez choisir de payer jusqu'à la moitié du coût du pouvoir de la Force en utilisant vos points de vie au lieu de vos points de Forces. Lorsque vous le faites, votre maximum de points de vie est réduit du même montant jusqu'à ce que vous complétiez un repos long.

Vous pouvez mettre fin à cet effet à tout moment. Si vous lancez un pouvoir de la Force qui réduirait vos points de vie à 0, le pouvoir échoue automatiquement et cet effet prend fin.

Mind Blank.name: Esprit vide
Mind Blank.description:
Prerequisite: Mind Trap

Until the power ends, one willing creature you contact is immune to psychic and sonic dégâts, any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, and the charmé condition. The power foils powers or effects of similar power used to affect la cible's mind or to gain information about la cible.

Greater Feedback.name: Les meilleurs commentaires
Greater Feedback.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Feedback

You choose a point within range and cause psychic energy to explode there. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. A creature with an Intelligence score of 2 or lower can't be affected by this power. A target takes [[/r 8d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

After a failed sauvegarde, a target has muddled thoughts pendant 1 minute. During that time, it rolls a [[/r d6]] and subtracts the number rolled from all its attack rolls and test de caractéristiques, as well as its Constitution jet de sauvegardes to maintain concentration. La cible can make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

Valor.name: Valeur
Valor.description:
Prérequis : Résistance

Vous bénissez jusqu'à trois créatures de votre choix à portée. Chaque fois qu'une cible effectue un jet d'attaque ou un jet de sauvegarde avant la fin du pouvoir, la cible peut lancer un [[/r d4]] et ajouter le nombre obtenu au jet d'attaque ou au jet de sauvegarde.

Potence de force. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir avec un emplacement de force de niveau 3 ou supérieur, vous peut cibler une créature supplémentaire tous les deux niveaux d'emplacement au-dessus du 1er. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir au niveau 3, 6 ou 9, le dé passe respectivement à [[/r d6]], [[/r d8]] et [[/r d10]].

Improved Restoration.name: Restauration améliorée
Improved Restoration.description:
Prerequisite: Restoration

You imbue a creature you contact with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect. Vous pouvez réduire la cible's épuisement niveau by one, or end one of the following effects on la cible:

  • One effect that charmé la cible.
  • One curse, including la cible's attunement to a cursed item.
  • Any reduction to one of la cible's score de caractéristiques.
  • One effect reducing la cible's point de vie maximum.

Turbulence.name: Turbulence
Turbulence.description:
Choose une créature, or choose two creatures that are within 5 mètres of each other, within range. A target must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d6]] force dégâts.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach 5th, 11th, and niveau 17.

Morichro.name: Morichro
Morichro.description:
Prerequisite: Cloud Mind

You contact a willing creature and put it into a cataleptic state that is indistinguishable from death.

For the power's duration, or until you use an action to contact la cible and dismiss the power, la cible appears dead to all outward inspection and to powers used to determine la cible's status. La cible is aveuglé and incapacitated, and its speed drops to 0. La cible has resistance to all dégâts except psychic dégâts. If la cible is diseased or empoisonné when you cast the power, or becomes diseased or empoisonné while under the power's effect, the disease and poison have no effect until the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Coerce Mind.name: Contraindre l'esprit
Coerce Mind.description:
Prerequisite: Affect Mind

You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and influence with the Force a creature you can see within range that can hear and understand you. Creatures that can't be charmé are immune to this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking la créature to harm itpersonnelle automatically negates the effect of the power.

La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it pursues the course of action you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of action can continue for the entire duration. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the power ends when the subject finishes what it was asked to do.

You can also specify conditions that will trigger a special activity during the duration. For example, you might suggest that a soldier give her speeder to the first vagrant she meets. If the condition isn't met before the power expires, the activity isn't performed.

If you or any of your companions dégâts la cible, the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Jump.name: Force Jump
Force Jump.description:
Prerequisite: Force Leap

Using the Force to augment the strength in your legs, you leap up to 30 mètres to an unoccupied space you can see, provided you have a direct path to the space.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, your jump distance increases by 5 mètres for each slot niveau above 1st.

Locate Creature.name: Localiser la créature
Locate Creature.description:
Prerequisite: Locate Object

Describe or name a creature familiar to you. You sense the direction to la créature's location, as long as its within 1000 mètres of you. If la créature is in motion, you know the direction of its movement. The power can locate a specific creature known to you or the nearest of a specific kind, as long as you have seen it while within 30 mètres of it. If la créature is in a different form, the power doesn't work. This power can't locate a creature if running water at least 10 mètres wide blocks a direct path between you and la créature.

Dominate Monster.name: Dominer le monstre
Dominate Monster.description:
Prerequisite: Dominate Mind

You attempt to beguile a creature that you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be charmé by you for the duration. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde.

While la créature is charmé, you have a telepathic link with it as long as you are within 1 mile of it. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to la créature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack cette créature," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If la créature completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itpersonnelle to the best of its ability.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour take total and precise control of la cible. Until the end of your next turn, la créature takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time, you can also cause la créature to use a réaction, but this requires you to use your own réaction as well.

Each time la cible takes dégâts, it makes a new Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against the power. If the jet de sauvegarde succeeds, the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power with a 9th-niveau force slot, the duration is concentration, up to 8 hours.

Greater Saber Throw.name: Lancer de sabre supérieur
Greater Saber Throw.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Saber Throw

As a part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a ranged force attack with a lightweapon or vibroweapon against une cible within the power's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 6d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts and must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against an additional effect depending on your choice of casting ability:

Wisdom. La cible takes an additional [[/r 4d6]] force dégâts and it gains four niveaus of slowed until the end of its next turn. On a success, la cible takes half as much dégâts and its speed isn't reduced.

Charisma. La cible takes an additional [[/r 4d6]] necrotic dégâts and cannot regain points de vie until the end of its next turn. On a success, la cible takes half as much dégâts and its healing capability is unaffected.

The weapon then immediately returns to your hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, the force or necrotic dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot above 5th.

Revitalize.name: Revitalisant
Revitalize.description:
Prerequisite: Spare the Dying

You return a dead creature you contact to life, provided that it has been dead no longer than 10 minutes. If la créature's soul is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the body, la créature returns to life with 1 point de vie. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

This power also neutralizes any poisons and cures diseases that affected la créature at the time it died.

This power closes all mortal wounds, but it doesn't restore missing body parts. If la créature is lacking body parts or organs integral for its survival—its head, for instance—the power automatically fails.

Coming back from the dead is an ordeal. La cible takes a -4 penalty to all attack rolls, jet de sauvegardes, and test de caractéristiques. Every time la cible finishes a repos long, the penalty is reduced by 1 until it disappears.

Ruin.name: Ruine
Ruin.description:
Prerequisite: Wound

You channel the dark side of the Force to desecrate a creature you can see within range, causing waves of intense pain to assail it. If la cible has 100 points de vie or fewer, it is subject to crippling pain. Otherwise, the power has no effect on it.

While la cible is affected by crippling pain, any speed it has can be no higher than 10 mètres. La cible also has disavantage on attack rolls, test de caractéristiques, and jet de sauvegardes, other than Constitution jet de sauvegardes.
