Finally, if la cible tries to cast a power, it must first succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde, or the casting fails and the power is wasted.

A target suffering this pain can make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. On a successful sauvegarde, the pain ends.

Darkness.name: Obscurité
Darkness.description:
L'obscurité se propage à partir d'un point que vous choisissez à portée pour remplir une sphère de 15 pieds de rayon jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir. L’obscurité s’étend dans les coins. Une créature dotée de la vision dans le noir ne peut pas voir à travers ces ténèbres, et une lumière non améliorée ne peut pas l'éclairer.

Si le point que vous choisissez se trouve sur un objet que vous tenez ou sur un objet qui n'est pas porté ou transporté, l'obscurité vient de l'objet et se déplace avec lui. Couvrir complètement la source de l'obscurité avec un objet opaque bloque l'obscurité.

Si la zone de ce pouvoir chevauche la lumière créée par un pouvoir de 2e niveau ou inférieur, la lumière est dissipée.

Improved Phasewalk.name: Phasewalk amélioré
Improved Phasewalk.description:
Prerequisite: Phasewalk

You teleport up to 60 mètres to an unoccupied space you can see. On each of your turns before the power ends, you can use a action bonus to teleport in this way again.

Force Reflect.name: Force Reflect
Force Reflect.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Reflect

In response to being attacked, you attempt to deflect the attack with the Force. When you use this power, the dégâts you take from the attack is reduced by [[/r 1d10]]. If you reduce the dégâts to 0 and the dégâts is energy, force, ion, kinetic, lightning, necrotic, or sonic, you can reflect the attack at a target within range as part of the same réaction. Make a ranged force attack at a target you can see. The attack has a normal range of 30 mètres and a long range of 90 mètres. En cas de contacter, la cible takes the triggering attack's normal dégâts.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts reduction increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Seethe.name: Bouillonner
Seethe.description: Vous bouillonnez de colère, laissant le côté obscur de la Force vous traverser et vous donner du pouvoir. Dans le cadre de l'action de lancement de ce pouvoir, vous dépensez un de vos Dés de Vie pour récupérer des points de vie.

Siphon Life.name: Siphonner la vie
Siphon Life.description:
Prerequisite: Drain Life

A tendril of inky darkness reaches out from you, contacting a creature you can see within range to drain life from it. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 2d8]] necrotic dégâts, and the power ends. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 4d8]] necrotic dégâts, and until the power ends, you can use your action on each of your turns to automatically deal [[/r 4d8]] necrotic dégâts to la cible. The power ends if you use your action to do anything else, if la cible is ever outside the power's range, or if la cible has total cover from you.

Whenever the power deals dégâts to a target, you regain points de vie equal to half the amount of necrotic dégâts la cible takes.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 5th.

Shocking Shield.name: Bouclier Choquant
Shocking Shield.description:
Prerequisite: Shock

Lightning courses in a sphere surrounding your body, shedding bright light in a rayon de 3 mètres and dim light for an additional 10 mètres. Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour end the power early.

Whenever a creature within 5 mètres of you hits you with a attaque au corps à corps, it takes [[/r 2d8]] lightning dégâts.

Burst of Speed.name: Explosion de vitesse
Burst of Speed.description:
You contact a creature. La cible's speed increases by 10 mètres until the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 1st.

Force Throw.name: Lancer de force
Force Throw.description:
Prerequisite: Force Push/Pull

You use the Force to move a Large or smaller creature or object not being worn or carried within

range. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. An object automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature or object moves a number of mètres in a direction de votre choix based on its size. A Tiny creature or object can be moved up to 90 mètres, a Small creature or object can be moved up to 60 mètres, a Medium creature or object can be moved up to 30 mètres, and a Large creature or object can be moved up to 10 mètres. If at the end of this movement la créature or object strikes another creature or object, they both take [[/r 2d8]] force dégâts.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the range you can throw a creature or object increases by 10 mètres, to a maximum of 90 mètres, and the power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]].

Force Storm.name: Force Storm
Force Storm.description:
Prerequisite: Force Lightning Cone

A crackling storm of lightning with a diameter of 60 mètres and a height of 120 mètres appears in a location you choose within range. Whenever a creature enters the storm or starts its turn there, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 30d6]] lightning dégâts or half as much as a successful one.

The power dégâtss objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.

Force Focus.name: Force Focus
Force Focus.description:
Prerequisite: Force Technique

You let the Force guide you, empowering your strikes. Until the power ends, your attaque d'armes deal an extra [[/r 1d4]] force dégâts on a hit.

Master Pyrokinesis.name: Maître Pyrokinèse
Master Pyrokinesis.description:
Prerequisite: Greater Pyrokinesis

A storm made up of sheets of roaring, Force-enhanced flame appears in a location you choose within range. The area of the storm consists of up to ten 10-foot cubes, which you can arrange as you wish. Each cube must have at least one face adjacent to the face of another cube. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 7d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature in the area of more than one cube is affected only once.

The flame dégâtss objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.

Improved Pyrokinesis.name: Pyrokinèse améliorée
Improved Pyrokinesis.description:
Prerequisite: Pyrokinesis

A line of roaring Force-enhanced flame 30 mètres long and 5 mètres wide emanates from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d8]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Force Current.name: Force Current
Force Current.description:
Prerequisite: Force Push/Pull

When you cast this power, you raise your hand and unleash a burst of Force energy. Each creature in a cône de 4,5 mètres must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 3d6]] force dégâts and, if it is Large or smaller, is also pushed back 5 mètres. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half as much dégâts and isn't pushed. All Medium or smaller objects that are not worn or carried within the area of effect are also pushed 5 mètres.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st. For each slot 2 niveaus higher than 1st, you can add an additional 5 mètres to the push.

Danger Sense.name: Sens du danger
Danger Sense.description:
Vous faites confiance à la Force, vous anticipez l'avenir et voyez si vos actions mèneront à la fortune ou à la ruine. Le MJ choisit parmi les présages possibles suivants :

  • Paix, pour des résultats qui ne sont pas dangereux
  • Danger, pour des résultats qui sont dangereux mais qui en valent peut-être la peine. danger
  • Ruine, pour des résultats qui se termineront certainement par la mort ou la tragédie

Le pouvoir ne prend pas en compte les circonstances possibles qui pourraient changer le résultat, comme l'utilisation de pouvoirs supplémentaires ou la perte ou le gain d'un compagnon.

Si vous utilisez ce pouvoir deux fois ou plus avant de terminer votre prochain repos long, il y a 25 % de chances cumulées pour chaque lancement après le premier que vous obteniez un résultat neutre, quel que soit le résultat réel.

Dark Side Tendrils.name: Vrilles du côté obscur
Dark Side Tendrils.description:
Tendrils of dark energy erupt from you and batter all creatures within 10 mètres of you. Each creature in that area must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a target takes [[/r 2d6]] necrotic dégâts and can't take réactions until its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half dégâts, but suffers no other effect.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a power slot of niveau 2 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Aura of Vigor.name: Aura de vigueur
Aura of Vigor.description:
Prerequisite: Valor

Envigorating energy radiates from you in a rayon de 9 mètres. Until the power ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. Each nonhostile creature in the aura (including you) deals an extra [[/r 1d4]] dégâts with attaque d'armes.

Remove Curse.name: Supprimer la malédiction
Remove Curse.description: At your contact, all curses affecting une créature or object end. If the object is a cursed enhanced item, its curse remains, but the power breaks its owner's attunement to the object so it can be removed or discarded.

Hallucination.name: Hallucination
Hallucination.description:
You craft a dangerous illusion in the mind of a creature that you can see within range. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, you create a phantasmal object, creature, or other visible phenomenon de votre choix that is no larger than a 10-foot cube and that is perceivable only to la cible for the duration. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

The hallucination includes sound, temperature, and other stimuli, also evident only to la créature.

La cible can use its action to examine the hallucination with an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your pouvoir de la Force sauvegarde DD. If the check succeeds, la cible realizes that the hallucination is an illusion, and the power ends.

While a target is affected by the power, la cible treats the hallucination as if it were real. La cible rationalizes any illogical outcomes from interacting with the hallucination. For example, a target attempting to walk across a phantasmal bridge that spans a chasm falls once it steps onto the bridge. If la cible survives the fall, it still believes that the bridge exists and comes up with some other explanation for its fall - it was pushed, it slipped, or a strong wind might have knocked it off.

An affected target is so convinced of the hallucination's reality that it can even take dégâts from the illusion. A hallucination created to appear as a creature can attack la cible. Similarly, a hallucination created to appear as fire, a pool of acid, or lava can burn la cible. Each round on your turn, the hallucination can deal [[/r 1d6]] psychic dégâts to la cible if it is in the hallucination's area or within 5 mètres of the hallucination, provided that the illusion is of a creature or hazard that could logically deal dégâts, such as by attacking. La cible perceives the dégâts as a type appropriate to the illusion.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a pouvoir de la Force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the range increases by 20 mètres, the image dimensions increase by 5 mètres, and you can target one additional creature for every two slot niveaus above 2nd.

Saber Ward.name: Garde de sabre
Saber Ward.description: You take a defensive stance. Until the end of your next turn, you have resistance against kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts dealt by weapons.

Greater Pyrokinesis.name: Pyrokinèse supérieure
Greater Pyrokinesis.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Pyrokinesis

You create a wall of Force-enhanced fire on a solid surface within range. Vous pouvez faire the wall up to 60 mètres long, 20 mètres high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 mètres in diameter, 20 mètres high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts for the duration.

When the wall appears, chaque créature within its area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 5d8]] energy dégâts, or half as much dégâts on a successful sauvegarde.

One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this power, deals [[/r 5d8]] energy dégâts to chaque créature that ends its turn within 10 mètres of that side or inside the wall. A creature takes the same dégâts when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no dégâts.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 4th.

Saber Strike.name: Frappe au sabre
Saber Strike.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Assault

As part of the action used to cast the power, you can move up to your speed and make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps. En cas de contacter, the attack deals an extra [[/r 1d10]] dégâts of the weapon's type. De plus, if you hit with the attack, la cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the bonus weapon dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for every two slot niveaus above 2nd.

Force Project.name: Force Project
Force Project.description:
You create an illusory copy of yourpersonnelle that lasts for the duration. The copy can appear at any location that you have seen before, regardless of intervening obstacles. The illusion looks and sounds like you but is intangible. If the illusion takes any dégâts, it disappears, and the power ends.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour move this illusion up to twice your speed, and make it gesture, speak, and behave in whatever way you choose. It mimics your mannerisms perfectly.

You can see through its eyes and hear through its ears as if you were in its space. On your turn as a action bonus, you can switch from using its senses to using your own, or back again. While you are using its senses, you are aveuglé and assourdi in regard to your own surroundings.

Physical interaction with the image reveals it to be an illusion, because things can pass through it. A creature that uses its action to examine the image can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your force sauvegarde DD. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, la créature can see through the image, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to la créature.

Skill Empowerment.name: Autonomisation des compétences
Skill Empowerment.description:
Your power with the Force deepens a creature's understanding of its own talent. You contact one willing creature and give it expertise in one skill de votre choix; until the power ends, la créature doubles its bonus de maîtrise for test de caractéristiques it makes that use the chosen skill.

You must choose a skill in which la cible is proficient and that isn't already benefiting from an effect, such as Expertise, that doubles its bonus de maîtrise.

Eruption.name: Éruption
Eruption.description:
Prerequisite: Convulsion

You cause up to six pillars of stone to burst from places on the ground that you can see within range. Each pillar is a cylinder that has a diameter of 5 mètres and a height of up to 30 mètres. The ground where a pillar appears must be wide enough for its diameter, and you can target the ground under a creature if cette créature is Medium or smaller. Each pillar has AC 5 and 30 points de vie. When reduced to 0 points de vie, a pillar crumbles into rubble, which creates an area of difficult terrain with a 10 - foot radius that lasts until the rubble is cleared. Each 5-foot-diameter portion of the area requires at least 1 minute to clear by hand.

If a pillar is created under a creature, cette créature must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or be lifted by the pillar. A creature can choose to fail the sauvegarde.

If a pillar is prevented from reaching its full height because of a ceiling or other obstacle, a creature on the pillar takes [[/r 6d6]] kinetic dégâts and is entravé, pinched between the pillar and the obstacle. The entravé creature can use an action to make a Strength or test de Dextérité (la créature's choice) against the power's sauvegarde DD. On a success, la créature is no longer entravé and must either move off the pillar or fall off it.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, you can create two additional pillars for each slot niveau above 6th.

Mind Trap.name: Piège mental
Mind Trap.description:
Prerequisite: Force Confusion

You attempt to trap the mind of your target in a psychic cage. La cible must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is incapacitated for the duration as its mind is trapped. It can think, but it can't have any contact with or perceive the outside world. If la créature takes dégâts, it makes another Charisma sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, after 1 minute of concentration the power's duration becomes 24 hours and it no longer requires your concentration.

Force Breach.name: Force Breach
Force Breach.description:
Choose a spot within range. All pouvoir de la Forces of niveau 5 or lower in the area end. For each pouvoir de la Force of niveau 6 or higher in the area, make an test de caractéristique using your forcecasting ability. The DD equals 10 + the power's niveau. On a successful check, the pouvoir de la Force ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, you automatically end the effects of a pouvoir de la Force on la cible if the power's niveau is equal to or less than the niveau of the force slot you used.

Grasping Vine.name: Vigne saisissante
Grasping Vine.description:
Prerequisite: Plant Surge

You make a vine sprout from the ground in an unoccupied space you can see. When you cast this power, you can make the vine whip a creature up to 30 mètres from it, if you can see la cible. The creature must pass a Dexterity sauvegarde or be pulled 20 mètres directly toward the vine.

Until the power ends, you can use your action bonus to have the vine lash out again.

Improved Force Camouflage.name: Improved Force Camouflage
Improved Force Camouflage.description:
Prérequis : Camouflage de Force

A La créature volontaire que vous contactez devient invisible jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir. Tout ce que la cible porte ou transporte est invisible tant qu'il se trouve sur la personne de la cible.

Shock.name: Choc
Shock.description:
You hurl a bolt of lightning at a target within range, making a ranged force attack. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d10]] lightning dégâts. The lightning ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d10]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d10]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d10]]).

Rescue.name: Sauvetage
Rescue.description: You pull one willing ally you can see within 30 mètres of you to an unoccupied space within 5 mètres of you. La cible must use their réaction to accept the pull.

Reveal Shatterpoint.name: Révéler le point de rupture
Reveal Shatterpoint.description:
Prerequisite: Sense Shatterpoint

You focus on a creature you can see within range, and gain uncanny insight on its defenses and capabilities through the Force. La cible must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, you have avantage on attack rolls against cette créature, and it has disavantage on attack rolls against you for the duration. On a successful sauvegarde, you have avantage on the next attack roll you make against cette créature, and it has disavantage on its next attack roll against you. Once both attacks have been made, the power ends.

Probe Mind.name: Sonder l'esprit
Probe Mind.description:
Prerequisite: Sense Emotion

For the duration, you can read the thoughts of certain creatures. When you cast the power and as your action on each turn until the power ends, you can focus your mind on any une créature that you can see within 30 mètres of you. If la créature you choose has an Intelligence of 3 or lower or doesn't speak any language, la créature is unaffected.

You initially learn the surface thoughts of la créature—what is most on its mind in that moment. As an action, you can either shift your attention to another creature's thoughts or attempt to probe deeper into the same creature's mind. If you probe deeper, la cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, it takes [[/r 1d6]] psychic dégâts as you gain insight into its reasoning (if any), its emotional state, and something that looms large in its mind (such as something it worries over, loves, or hates). If it succeeds, the power ends. Either way, la cible knows that you are probing into its mind, and unless you shift your attention to another creature's thoughts, la créature can use its action on its turn to make an test d'Intelligence contested by your forcecasting test de caractéristique; if it succeeds, the power ends.

On subsequent turns after probing deeper, you can use your action to deal [[/r 1d6]] psychic dégâts to la cible automatically.

Questions verbally directed at la cible creature naturally shape the course of its thoughts, so this power is particularly effective as part of an interrogation.

You can also use this power to detect the presence of thinking creatures you can't see. When you cast the power or as your action during the duration, you can search for thoughts within 30 mètres of you. The power can penetrate barriers. You can't detect a creature with an Intelligence of 3 or lower or one that doesn't speak any language.

Once you detect the presence of a creature in this way, you can read its thoughts for the rest of the duration as described above, even if you can't see it, but it must still be within range.

This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the initial psychic dégâts a target takes the first time you probe deeper into its mind increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Force Lightning Cone.name: Force Lightning Cone
Force Lightning Cone.description:
Prerequisite: Force Chain Lightning

Lightning arcs from your hands. Each creature in a cône de 18 mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 8 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 2d6]] for each slot niveau above 7th.

Master Battle Meditation.name: Méditation de combat de maître
Master Battle Meditation.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Battle Meditation

You exude an aura out to 30 mètres that boosts the morale and overall battle prowess you and your allies while simultaneously reducing the opposition's combat-effectiveness by eroding their will to fight.

Whenever you or a friendly creature within your meditation makes an attack roll or a jet de sauvegarde, they can roll a [[/r d8]] and add the number rolled to the attack roll or jet de sauvegarde.

Whenever a hostile creature enters your meditation or starts its turn there, it must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the number rolled from each attack roll or jet de sauvegarde it makes before the end of your next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, it is immune to this power for 1 day.

Plant Surge.name: Surtension des plantes
Plant Surge.description:
If you cast this power using 1 action, all normal plants in a 100-foot radius centered on a point become overgrown. Moving through the area spends 4 mètres of movement for every 1 foot moved. You can exclude areas of any size within the power's area from being affected.

If you cast this power over 8 hours, all plants in a half-mile radius centered on a point yield twice the normal amount of food when harvested for 1 year.

Pyrokinesis.name: Pyrokinèse
Pyrokinesis.description:
By stimulating air molecules, you create a zone of Force-enhanced fire on ground that you can see within range. Until the power ends, the enhanced fire fills a 5-foot cube. Any creature in the fire's space when you cast the power must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or take [[/r 1d8]] energy dégâts. A creature must also make the jet de sauvegarde when it moves into the fire's space for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there.

The fire ignites flammable objects in its area that aren't being worn or carried.

The power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d8]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d8]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Drain Vitality.name: Drainer la vitalité
Drain Vitality.description:
Prerequisite: Sap Vitality

You draw the willpower from a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged force attack against la cible. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 2d6]] necrotic dégâts and it deals only half dégâts with attaque d'armes that use Strength until the power ends.

At the end of each of la cible's turns, it can make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against the power. On a success, the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Psychic Charge.name: Charge psychique
Psychic Charge.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and its mouth is covered by a violet veil jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If la cible willingly speaks before then, it immediately takes [[/r 1d8]] psychic dégâts, and the power ends.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] psychic dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes for speaking increases to [[/r 2d8]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Force Camouflage.name: Force Camouflage
Force Camouflage.description: Vous devenez invisible jusqu'à la fin du pouvoir. Tout ce que vous portez ou portez est invisible tant qu’il se trouve sur vous. Le pouvoir prend fin si vous attaquez, lancez un pouvoir ou effectuez une action hostile.

Improved Saber Throw.name: Lancer de sabre amélioré
Improved Saber Throw.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Throw

As a part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a ranged force attack with a lightweapon or vibroweapon against une cible within the power's range, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 2d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts and must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn and the weapon then immediately returns to your hand. The next attack made against la cible that hits it before the end of la cible's next turn deals an additional [[/r 1d10]] force dégâts. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes half as much additional force dégâts on the next attack that hits it, and suffers no additional effect. The weapon then immediately returns to your hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the force dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Beast Trick.name: Astuce de bête
Beast Trick.description:
This power lets you distract a beast. Choose a beast that you can see within range. If the beast's Intelligence is 4 or higher, the power fails. Otherwise, the beast must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be charmé by you for the power's duration. If you or one of your companions harms la cible, the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can affect one additional beast for each slot niveau above 1st.

Whirlwind.name: Tourbillon
Whirlwind.description:
A whirlwind howls down to a point that you can see on the ground within range. The whirlwind is a 10-foot-radius, 30-foot-high cylinder centered on that point. Until the power ends, you can use your action to move

the whirlwind up to 30 mètres in any direction along the ground. The whirlwind sucks up any Medium or smaller objects that aren't secured to anything and that aren't worn or carried by anyone.

A creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde the first time on a turn that it enters the whirlwind or that the whirlwind enters its space, including when the whirlwind first appears. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, a Large or smaller creature that fails the sauvegarde must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or become entravé in the whirlwind until the power ends. When a creature starts its turn entravé by the whirlwind, la créature is pulled 5 mètres higher inside it, unless la créature is at the top. A entravé creature moves with the whirlwind and falls when the power ends, unless la créature has some means to stay aloft.

A entravé creature can use an action to make a Strength or test de Dextérité against your force sauvegarde DD. If successful, la créature is no longer entravé by the whirlwind and is hurled [[/r 3d6*10]] mètres away from it in a random direction.

Cloud Mind.name: Esprit Nuage
Cloud Mind.description:
Roll [[/r 5d8]]; the total is how many points de vie of creatures this power can affect. Creatures within 20 mètres of a point you choose are affected in order of their current points de vie.

Starting with la créature that has the lowest current points de vie, chaque créature affected by this power falls inconscient. If the power ends, the sleeper takes dégâts, or someone uses an action wake the sleeper, they will be awoken.

Subtract chaque créature's points de vie from the total before moving on to la créature with the next lowest points de vie. A creature's points de vie must be equal to or less than the remaining total for cette créature to be affected.

This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, you can roll an additional [[/r 2d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Call Lightning.name: Appeler Lightning
Call Lightning.description:
As you align yourpersonnelle with nature through the Force, a 10-foot tall, rayon de 18 mètres storm cloud cylinder appears, centered on a point you can see within range above you, with you as the center point. The power fails if your location can't accommodate the cloud's size or height. When you cast the power, choose a point under the cloud for lightning to strike. Each creature within 5 mètres must make a Dexterity sauvegarde, taking [[/r 3d10]] lightning dégâts on a fail and half on a success. While the power persists, you can use your action to call lightning to a point in range again.

If you're outdoors and in a storm, the power gives you control of the storm rather than creating a new one. The lightning dégâts also increases by [[/r 1d10]].

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d10]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Sustained Lightning.name: Foudre soutenue
Sustained Lightning.description:
Prerequisite: Shock

You lash out against a creature within range with continual jolts of Force lightning. Make a ranged force attack against cette créature. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d12]] lightning dégâts, and on each of your turns for the duration, you can use your action to deal [[/r 1d12]] lightning dégâts to la cible automatically. The power ends if you use your action to do anything else. The power also ends if la cible is ever outside the power's range or if it has total cover from you.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the initial dégâts increases by [[/r 1d12]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Telekinetic Burst.name: Explosion télékinésique
Telekinetic Burst.description:
Prerequisite: Telekinetic Storm

A beam of Force energy flashes out from your hand in a 5-foot-wide, 60-foot-long line. Each creature in the line must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 8d6]] force dégâts and is knocked à terre. On a successful sauvegarde, it takes half as much dégâts and isn't knocked à terre.

You can create a new telekinetic gust as your action on your turn until the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 2d6]] for each slot niveau above 6th.

Force Intuition.name: Force Intuition
Force Intuition.description:
Your senses attune to your environment for the duration, allowing you to see things before they happen, and react even faster than normal. For the duration, you can use your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique in place of your Dexterity modificateur quand vous faites initiative checks, if the check doesn't already include that modificateur.

De plus, once during the duration of this power, if you are surprised at the start of combat, rather than being completely unable to act, you can still use a réaction, and take an action on your first turn in combat. This action can be used only to take one of the following actions: Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Hide, or Use an Object.

Stun.name: Étourdir
Stun.description: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make another Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Pull Earthward.name: Tirez vers la Terre
Pull Earthward.description:
Prerequisite: Force Propel

Choose une créature you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or its flying speed (if any) is reduced to 0 mètres for the power's duration. An airborne creature affected by this power descends at 60 mètres per round until it reaches the ground or the power ends.

Force Link.name: Force Link
Force Link.description:
Prerequisite: Force Meld

You create a telepathic link between yourpersonnelle and a willing creature with which you are familiar. Until the power ends, you and la cible can instantaneously share words, images, sounds, and other sensory messages with one another through the link, and la cible recognizes you as la créature it is communicating with. The power enables a creature with an Intelligence score of at least 1 to understand the meaning of your words and take in the scope of any sensory messages you send to it. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Repulse.name: Force Repulse
Force Repulse.description:
You release an omnidirectional telekinetic burst. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 8d6]] force dégâts and is pushed back 5 mètres. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't pushed.

All small objects that are not worn or carried are also pushed 5 mètres back.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Force Propel.name: Force Propel
Force Propel.description:
Prerequisite: Force Push/Pull

Choose one or more creatures or objects not being worn or carried within 60 mètres that weigh up to a combined total of 15 pounds. The creatures or objects immediately move 60 mètres in a direction de votre choix. If la créatures or objects end this movement in the air, they immediately fall to the ground. If la créatures or objects collide with any une cible during its travel, both la créatures or objects and la cible take [[/r 3d8]] kinetic dégâts. If la cible is a creature, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes the kinetic dégâts, or half as much on a successful one.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the maximum weight increases by 15 pounds and the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 1st.

Kill.name: Tuer
Kill.description:
Prerequisite: Ruin

You compel une créature you can see within range to die instantly. If la créature you choose has 100 points de vie or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, the power has no effect.

Telekinetic Storm.name: Tempête télékinésique
Telekinetic Storm.description:
Prerequisite: Turbulence

You stir the Force around you, creating a turbulent field of telekinetic energy that buffets enemies around you. The field extends out to a distance of 15 mètres around you for the duration.

When you cast this power, you can designate any number of creatures you can see to be unaffected by it. An affected creature gains 1 slowed niveau while in the area, and when la créature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 3d8]] force dégâts. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half as much dégâts.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a pouvoir de la Force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Force Enlightenment.name: Force Enlightenment
Force Enlightenment.description:
Prerequisite: Guidance

You contact a creature and enhance it with the Force. Choose one of the following effects; la cible gains that effect until the power ends.

  • Strength. La cible has avantage on test de Forces, and his or her carrying capacity doubles.
  • Dexterity. La cible has avantage on test de Dextérités. It also doesn't take dégâts from falling 20 mètres or less if it isn't incapacitated.
  • Endurance. La cible has avantage on test de Constitutions. It also gains [[/r 2d6]] points de vie temporaires, which are lost when the power ends.
  • Cunning. La cible has avantage on test d'Intelligences.
  • Wisdom. La cible has avantage on test de Sagesses.
  • Splendor. La cible has avantage on test de Charismes.

This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Improved Force Immunity.name: Improved Force Immunity
Improved Force Immunity.description:
Prerequisite: Force Immunity

An immobile, faintly shimmering barrier springs into existence in a rayon de 4,5 mètres around you and remains for the duration. The barrier moves with you.

Any pouvoir de la Force of niveau 5 or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect creatures or objects within it, even if the power is cast using a higher niveau force slot. Such a power can target creatures and objects within the barrier, but the power has no effect on them. Similarly, the area within the barrier is excluded from the areas affected by such powers.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the barrier blocks powers of one niveau higher for each slot niveau above 6th.

Improved Force Barrier.name: Improved Force Barrier
Improved Force Barrier.description:
Prerequisite: Force Barrier

This power further bolsters your allies with toughness and resolve. Choose up to twelve creatures within range. Each target gains the following benefits:

  • The becomes immune to poison and disease. Any currently existing poison or diseases still exist.
  • The creature becomes immune to being effrayé by powers.
  • The creature's point de vie maximum and current points de vie increase by [[/r 2d10]] for the duration.

These benefits last for 24 hours or until the end of your next repos long, whichever happens first.

Master Force Scream.name: Master Force Scream
Master Force Scream.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Force Scream

You emit a cacophonous scream imbued with the power of the Force. Each creature you choose within 60 mètres of you must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 6d6]] psychic dégâts, [[/r 6d6]] sonic dégâts, is assourdi and aveuglé pendant 1 minute, and knocked à terre. On a successful sauvegarde, it takes half as much dégâts and isn't assourdi, aveuglé, or knocked à terre.

A creature aveuglé by this power makes another Constitution jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. On a successful sauvegarde, it is no longer aveuglé.

Sense Force.name: Sense Force
Sense Force.description:
For the duration, you sense the use of the Force, or its presence in an inanimate object within 30 mètres of you. If you sense the Force in this way, you can use your action to determine the direction from which it originates and, if it's in line of sight, you see a faint aura around the person or object from which the Force emanates.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a 3rd-niveau force slot, the range increases to 60 mètres. When you use a 5th-niveau force slot, the range increases to 500 mètres. When you use a 7th-niveau force slot, the range increases to 1 mile. When you use a 9th-niveau force slot, the range increases to 10 miles.

Force Suppression.name: Force Suppression
Force Suppression.description:
Choose une créature, object, or force effect within range. Any pouvoir de la Force of niveau 3 or lower on la cible ends. For each pouvoir de la Force of niveau 4 or higher on la cible, make an test de caractéristique using your forcecasting ability. The DD equals 10 + the power's niveau. On a success, the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, you automatically end the effects of a pouvoir de la Force on la cible if the power's niveau is equal to or less than the niveau of the force slot you used.

Armor of Abeloth.name: Armure d'Abeloth
Armor of Abeloth.description:
A protective force surrounds you, manifesting as shimmering light that covers you and your gear. You gain 5 points de vie temporaires for the duration. If a creature hits you with a attaque au corps à corps while you have these points de vie, la créature takes 5 psychic dégâts.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, both the points de vie temporaires and the psychic dégâts increase by 5 for each slot.

Force Whisper.name: Force Whisper
Force Whisper.description:
You use the Force to carry a message in your voice to another creature within range. La cible (and only la cible) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only you can hear.

You can cast this power through solid objects if you are familiar with la cible and know it is beyond the barrier. An enhanced silence effect, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 mètres of wood blocks the power. The power doesn't have to follow a straight line and can travel freely around corners or through openings.

Dominate Mind.name: Dominer l'esprit
Dominate Mind.description:
Prerequisite: Dominate Beast

You attempt to beguile a humanoid that you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be charmé by you for the duration. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde.

While la cible is charmé, you have a telepathic link with it as long as you are within 1 mile of it. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to la créature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack cette créature," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If la créature completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itpersonnelle to the best of its ability.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour take total and precise control of la cible. Until the end of your next turn, la créature takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time you can also cause la créature to use a réaction, but this requires you to use your own réaction as well.

Each time la cible takes dégâts, it makes a new Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against the power. If the jet de sauvegarde succeeds, the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a 6th-niveau force slot, the duration is 10 minutes. When you use a 7th-niveau force slot, the duration is 1 hour. When you use a force slot of niveau 8 or higher, the duration is 8 hours.

Affect Mind.name: Affecter l'esprit
Affect Mind.description:
Choose a target within range that isn't hostile toward you. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, you have avantage on all test de Charismes directed at cette cible.

On a successful sauvegarde, la créature does not realize that you tried to use the Force to influence its mood, but it becomes immune to this power for one day. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Mind Spike.name: Pointe mentale
Mind Spike.description: Choose une créature you can see. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d8]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, you always know la cible's location, but only while the two of you are on the same planet. La cible can't become hidden from you, and if it's invisible, it gains no benefits from this condition against you. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Rebuke.name: Réprimander
Rebuke.description:
You strike a creature with the righteous fury of the Force. Make a melee force attack against la cible, if the attack hits, la cible takes force dégâts depending on its alignment: a dark-aligned creature takes [[/r 1d12]] force dégâts, a balanced or unaligned creature takes [[/r 1d10]] force dégâts, and a light-aligned creature takes [[/r 1d8]] force dégâts.

The power's dégâts increases by one die when you reach 5th, 11th, and niveau 17.

Defensive Technique.name: Technique défensive
Defensive Technique.description:
As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and you ward yourpersonnelle from it through the Force.

If la cible forces you to make a jet de sauvegarde before the start of your next turn, la cible takes an additional [[/r 1d6]] psychic dégâts, and you can roll [[/r 1d4]] and add the number rolled to your jet de sauvegarde. The power then ends.

The power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d6]] psychic dégâts to la cible, and the psychic dégâts la cible takes for forcing you to make a jet de sauvegarde increases to [[/r 2d6]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d6]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Telepathic Link.name: Lien télépathique
Telepathic Link.description:
Prerequisite: Force Whisper

You establish a telepathic link with one willing creature you contact. Until the power ends, whenever you and la cible can see each other, each of you can communicate with the other via telepathy.

You don't need to share a language with a creature for it to understand your telepathic utterances, and la créature understands you even if it lacks a language. The creature can respond to you telepathically as well, but it must understand at least one language in order to communicate this way. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the duration increases to concentration, up to 1 hour, and if either you or la créature you are linked to are surprised while the other isn't, and both of you can see each other, the surprised creature can still act normally on its first turn in combat, as if it were not surprised.

Denounce.name: Dénoncer
Denounce.description:
A la cible de votre choix à portée doit faire un jet de sauvegarde Charisma. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, lorsque la cible effectue son prochain jet d'attaque ou jet de sauvegarde, elle doit lancer un [[/r d4]] et en soustraire le numéro. Le pouvoir prend alors fin.

Le dé de ce pouvoir augmente aux niveaux supérieurs : jusqu'à un [[/r d6]] au niveau 5, un [[/r d8]] au niveau 11 et un [[/r d10]] au niveau 17.

.

Destroy Droid.name: Détruire le droïde
Destroy Droid.description:
Prerequisite: Disable Droid

Choose a point that you can see within range. Each droid or construct must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the beginning of each of its turns, an affected target takes energy dégâts equal to twice your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique and then repeats this jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Improved Force Intuition.name: Improved Force Intuition
Improved Force Intuition.description:
Prerequisite: Force Intuition

You make your initiative check at avantage, and gain a +2 bonus to AC until the power ends. De plus, until the end of your first turn in the combat, your speed increases by 10 mètres and you add [[/r 1d4]] to your attack rolls. This power ends early si vous échouez a jet de sauvegarde or are hit by an attack.

Choke.name: Étouffer
Choke.description:
You make a constricting gesture at a creature within range. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde target takes [[/r 5d8]] force dégâts and is entravé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes half as much dégâts and is not entravé.

You can use a action bonus while la cible is entravé to move la cible up to 5 mètres in any direction.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Agile Defense.name: Défense Agile
Agile Defense.description: Dans le cadre de l'action de lancement de ce pouvoir, vous effectuez l'action Esquive.

Battle Insight.name: Aperçu de la bataille
Battle Insight.description:
Vous concentrez votre attention sur une cible à portée. Grâce à la Force, vous obtenez un bref aperçu des défenses de la cible. Lors de votre prochain tour, vous gagnez un avantage sur votre premier jet d'attaque contre la cible, à condition que ce pouvoir ne soit pas terminé.

Ce pouvoir bénéficie d'attaques supplémentaires aux niveaux supérieurs : deux attaques au niveau 5, trois attaques au niveau 11 et quatre attaques au niveau 17.

Force Barrier.name: Force Barrier
Force Barrier.description:
Ce pouvoir renforce vos alliés avec endurance et détermination. Choisissez jusqu'à trois créatures à portée. Le point de vie maximum de chaque cible et les points de vie actuels augmentent de 5 pour la durée.

Force Potency. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir en utilisant un emplacement de force de niveau 3 ou supérieur, les points de vie d'une cible augmentent de 5 supplémentaires pour chaque niveau d'emplacement supérieur. 2e.

Force Mask.name: Force Mask
Force Mask.description:
Prérequis : Astuce mentale

Jusqu'à ce que le pouvoir se termine ou que vous utilisiez une action pour le renvoyer, vous pouvez déguiser votre personnel en utilisant la Force de plusieurs manières. Vous pouvez paraître plus petit ou plus grand d’environ un pied et modifier l’apparence de votre corps et votre poids, mais vous ne pouvez pas modifier la structure de base de votre corps. Cet effet peut inclure vos vêtements, armes et autres effets personnels sur vous.

Cet effet est uniquement visuel, donc tout type de contact physique n'interagira qu'avec votre taille et votre forme réelles. Une créature qui utilise son action pour vous examiner peut identifier cet effet en réussissant un test d'Intelligence (Enquête) contre votre DD de sauvegarde de force.

Force Trance.name: Force Trance
Force Trance.description:
You make a calming gesture, and up to three willing creatures de votre choix that you can see within range fall inconscient for the power's duration. The power ends on a target early if it takes dégâts or someone uses an action to shake or slap it awake. If a target remains inconscient for the full duration, cette cible gains the benefit of a repos court, and it can't be affected by this power again until it finishes a repos long. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, you can target one additional willing creature for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Scourge.name: Fléau
Scourge.description:
Prerequisite: Plague

For the power's duration, your eyes become an inky void imbued with dread power. One creature de votre choix within 60 mètres of you that you can see must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be affected by one of the following effects de votre choix for the duration. On each of your turns until the power ends, you can use your action to target another creature but can't target a creature again if it has succeeded on a jet de sauvegarde against this casting of scourge.

Asleep. La cible falls inconscient. It wakes up if it takes any dégâts or if another creature uses its action to shake the sleeper awake.

Panicked. La cible is effrayé of you. On each of its turns, the effrayé creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest and shortest available route, unless there is nowhere to move. If la cible moves to a place at least 60 mètres away from you where it can no longer see you, this effect ends.

Sickened. La cible has disavantage on attack rolls and test de caractéristiques. At the end of each of its turns, it can make another Constitution jet de sauvegarde. If it succeeds, the effect ends.

Necrotic Touch.name: Toucher nécrotique
Necrotic Touch.description:
You attempt to drain the essence from a creature. Make a melee force attack against la cible. If the attack hits, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] necrotic dégâts, and you gain points de vie temporaires equal to the dégâts dealt jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

This power's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

Shadow Sight.name: Vue de l'ombre
Shadow Sight.description: You enhance your eyesight with the Force, allowing you to better see in the dark. For the duration, you have darkvision out to 60 mètres.

Force Weapon.name: Arme de force
Force Weapon.description:
Prerequisite: Force Imbuement

You contact an unenhanced weapon with which you are proficient. While you wield it for the duration, that weapon becomes an enhanced weapon with a +1 bonus to attack rolls and jet de dégâtss. De plus, you can use your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique instead of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for attacks and jet de dégâtss when attacking with that weapon.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 5 or higher, the bonus increases to +2. When you use a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the bonus increases to +3.

Phaseshift.name: Déphasage
Phaseshift.description: Too quickly for untrained eyes to perceive, you shift in position. You can move up to 5 mètres, and this movement does not provoke attaque d'opportunités.

Stasis Field.name: Champ de stase
Stasis Field.description:
Prerequisite: Stasis

Choose a point that you can see within range. Each creature within range of that point must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the end of each of a target's turns, it can make another Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 9, the size of the cube increases to 40 mètres.

Telemetry.name: Télémétrie
Telemetry.description:
Vous choisissez un objet que vous devez contacter tout au long du lancement du pouvoir. S'il s'agit d'un objet amélioré ou modifié, vous apprenez ses propriétés et comment les utiliser, s'il nécessite une harmonisation pour être utilisé et combien de charges il possède, le cas échéant. Vous apprenez si des pouvoirs affectent l'objet et quels sont ces pouvoirs.

Si l'objet a été créé par un pouvoir, vous apprenez quel pouvoir l'a créé. Si, à la place, vous contactez une créature tout au long du lancement, vous apprenez quel pouvoir de la Forces, le cas échéant, l'affecte actuellement.

Telekinetic Wave.name: Vague télékinésique
Telekinetic Wave.description:
Prerequisite: Telekinetic Burst

You manipulate the Force in a rayon de 18 mètres centered on a point you choose within range. Each creature in that area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 12d6]] force dégâts, is knocked à terre, and moved 5 mètres in a direction de votre choix. On a successful sauvegarde, it takes half as much dégâts and isn't knocked à terre or moved.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 9, the dégâts increases by [[/r 2d6]].

Spare the Dying.name: Épargner les mourants
Spare the Dying.description: Vous contactez un être vivant qui a 0 point de vie. La créature devient stable. Ce pouvoir n'a aucun effet sur les droïdes ou les constructions.

Break.name: Casser
Break.description:
You inflict 10 force dégâts to an object you can see within range that is not being worn or carried, generating an explosion of sound that can be heard up to 100 mètres away. Even if the object is not destroyed, small shards of shrapnel fly at creatures within 5 mètres of it. Each creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d4]] kinetic dégâts.

This power's kinetic dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d4]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d4]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d4]]), and the power's force dégâts also increases by 10 at each of these niveaus.

Greater Heal.name: Soins supérieurs
Greater Heal.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Heal

Choose a creature that you can see within range. A surge of positive energy washes through la créature, causing it to regain 70 points de vie. This power also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases affecting la cible. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the healing increases by 10 for each slot niveau above 6th.

Enfeeble.name: Affaiblir
Enfeeble.description:
Dark energy courses from your hand at a creature within range. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. If it is missing any points de vie, it takes [[/r 1d12]] necrotic dégâts. Otherwise, it takes [[/r 1d8]].

The power's dégâts increases by one die when you reach 5th, 11th, and niveau 17.

Slow.name: Carême
Slow.description:
A hostile creature de votre choix must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible gains 1 slowed niveau until the power ends. At the end of each of la créature's turns, it repeats this jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

This power can affect multiple targets when you reach higher niveaus: two targets at niveau 5, three targets at niveau 11, and four targets at niveau 17.

Improved Battle Meditation.name: Méditation de combat améliorée
Improved Battle Meditation.description:
Prerequisite: Battle Meditation

You exude an aura out to 15 mètres that boosts the morale and overall battle prowess you and your allies while simultaneously reducing the opposition's combat-effectiveness by eroding their will to fight.

Whenever you or a friendly creature within your meditation makes an attack roll or a jet de sauvegarde, they can roll a [[/r d6]] and add the number rolled to the attack roll or jet de sauvegarde.

Whenever a hostile creature enters your meditation or starts its turn there, it must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the number rolled from each attack roll or jet de sauvegarde it makes before the end of your next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, it is immune to this power for 1 day.

Art of Movement.name: Art du mouvement
Art of Movement.description:
Prerequisite: Instinctive Movement

By letting the Force flow through you, you move with preternatural grace, leaping onto or over tall obstacles that impede others. Until the power ends, you gain the following benefits:

  • Your speed increases by 10 mètres.
  • You have resistance to dégâts from falling.
  • Your jumping distance is tripled.
  • You gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed, and you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. If you are on a vertical surface when you end your turn and are not using your hands to climb, you immediately fall unless you have some other means of remaining there.
  • Your movement is unaffected by difficult terrain or squeezing.
  • You ignore the effects of slowed niveaus under 3.

Once before the power ends, you can give yourpersonnelle avantage on one attaque d'arme roll on your turn. That attack deals an extra [[/r 1d10]] force dégâts on a hit. Whether you hit or miss, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed until the end of that turn.

Heighten Senses.name: Augmenter les sens
Heighten Senses.description: Through the Force, you sense a sudden shift in your environment, and can seize on it with great speed. You gain avantage on your initiative check, and until the end of your first turn in combat, your walking speed increases by 30 mètres.

Restoration.name: Restauration
Restoration.description: You contact a creature and end either one disease or one condition afflicting it. The condition can be aveuglé, assourdi, paralysé, or empoisonné. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Disperse Force.name: Disperse Force
Disperse Force.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Ward

This power absorbs dégâts from certain incoming attacks, lessening its effect on you and distributing it throughout your body. You have resistance to the triggering type de dégâts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Also, you gain 5 points de vie temporaires to potentially absorb the attack. These points de vie temporaires last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the points de vie temporaires increases by 5 for each slot niveau above 1st.

Force Blur.name: Force Blur
Force Blur.description:
Prérequis : Masque de Force

Vous utilisez la Force pour tisser une illusion qui brouille votre forme, se déplaçant et vacillant pour tous ceux qui peuvent vous voir. Pendant toute la durée du sort, toute créature est désavantagée aux jets d'attaque contre vous. Un attaquant est immunisé contre cet effet s'il ne s'appuie pas sur la vue, comme dans le cas de la vision aveugle, ou s'il peut voir à travers des illusions, comme dans le cas de la vision vraie.

Force Technique.name: Force Technique
Force Technique.description:
You imbue your weapon with the purifying light of the Force. As part of the action used to cast this power, you must make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against une créature within your reach, otherwise the power fails. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and it becomes wreathed in a glowing barrier of force energy jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If la cible willingly moves before then, it immediately takes [[/r 1d8]] force dégâts, and the power ends.

This power's dégâts increases when you reach higher niveaus. At niveau 5, the attaque au corps à corps deals an extra [[/r 1d8]] force dégâts to la cible, and the dégâts la cible takes for moving increases to [[/r 2d8]]. Both jet de dégâtss increase by [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 11 and niveau 17.

Telekinetic Shield.name: Bouclier télékinésique
Telekinetic Shield.description:
Prerequisite: Animate Weapon

You lift three piles of debris or small objects from the ground and interpose them between you and your opponents for the duration.

While at least three piles remain, you have three-quarters cover. While two piles remain, you have half cover. While only one pile remains, you have one-quarter cover. The piles don't hinder your attacks. When you cast the power, or as an action on a subsequent turn, you can direct up to two piles to attack up to two creatures you can see within 30 mètres. Make a ranged force attack roll for each pile. En cas de contacter, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic plus [[/r 1d10]] force dégâts. The pile is destroyed whether it hits or misses.

Force Potency. If you cast this power with a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the power creates one additional pile for each niveau above 3rd.

Mind Prison.name: Prison mentale
Mind Prison.description:
Prerequisite: Mind Trap

You attempt to bind a creature within an illusory cell that only it perceives. One creature you can see within range must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. La cible succeeds automatically if it is immune to being charmé. On a successful sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 5d10]] psychic dégâts, and the power ends. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 5d10]] psychic dégâts, and you make the area immediately around la cible's space appear dangerous to it in some way. You might cause la cible to perceive itpersonnelle as being surrounded by fire, a storm of blaster-fire, or deadly toxic gas, for example. Whatever form the illusion takes, la cible can't see or hear anything beyond it and is entravé for the power's duration. If la cible is moved out of the illusion, makes a attaque au corps à corps through it, or reaches any part of its body through it, la cible takes [[/r 10d10]] psychic dégâts, and the power ends. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Stun Droid.name: Droïde étourdissant
Stun Droid.description: Choose a droid or construct that you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be paralysé for the duration. At the beginning of each of its turns, la cible takes energy dégâts equal to your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make another Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends on la cible.

Force Blind/Deafen.name: Force Blind/Deafen
Force Blind/Deafen.description:
You can blind or deafen a foe. Choose une créature that you can see within range to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, la cible is either aveuglé or assourdi (your choice) for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, la cible can make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a success, the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Rage.name: Rage
Rage.description:
You endow yourpersonnelle with endurance and martial prowess fueled by the Force. Until the power ends, you can't cast powers, and you gain the following benefits:

  • You gain 50 points de vie temporaires. If any of these remain when the power ends, they are lost.
  • You have avantage on attack rolls that you make with lightweapons and vibroweapons.
  • When you hit a target with a attaque d'arme, cette cible takes an extra [[/r 2d12]] force dégâts.
  • You have maîtrise with all armor, lightweapons, and vibroweapons.
  • You have maîtrise in Strength and Constitution jet de sauvegardes.
  • You can attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action on your turn. You ignore this benefit if you already have a feature, like Extra Attack, that gives you extra attacks.

Immediately after the power ends, you must succeed on a DD 15 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or suffer one niveau of épuisement.

Project.name: Projet
Project.description:
You lift three piles of debris or small objects from the ground and hurl them. Each pile hits a creature de votre choix that you can see within range. The pile deals [[/r 1d4+1]] force dégâts to its target. The piles all strike simultaneously and you can direct them to hit une créature or several.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, you lift and throw an additional pile of debris for each slot niveau above 1st.

Force Confusion.name: Force Confusion
Force Confusion.description:
One humanoid de votre choix that you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or become charmé by you for the duration. The

charmé target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a attaque au corps à corps against a creature other than itpersonnelle that you mentally choose.

La cible can act normally on its turn if you choose no creature or if none are within its reach.

On your subsequent turns, you must use your action to maintain control over la cible, or the power ends. Also, la cible can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the power ends.

Wrack.name: Varech
Wrack.description:
Prerequisite: Plague

You wrack the body of a creature that you can see with a virulent, disease-like condition. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 14d6]] necrotic dégâts, or half as much dégâts on a successful sauvegarde. The dégâts can't reduce la cible's points de vie below 1. If la cible fails the jet de sauvegarde, its point de vie maximum is reduced for 1 hour by an amount equal to the necrotic dégâts it took. Any effect that removes a disease allows a creature's point de vie maximum to return to normal immediately.

Force Potency. If you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, the power deals an extra [[/r 2d6]] dégâts for each slot niveau above 6th.

Tapas.name: Tapas
Tapas.description: Vous utilisez la Force pour protéger votre personnel contre les éléments. Pour la durée, vous êtes considéré comme adapté aux climats chauds et froids.

Telekinesis.name: Télékinésie
Telekinesis.description:
Prerequisite: Force Throw

You gain the ability to move or manipulate creatures and objects with the Force. When you cast this power, and as your action each round for the duration, you can exert your will on une créature or object that you can see within range, causing the appropriate effect below. You can affect the same target round after round, or choose a new one at any time. If you switch targets, the prior target is no longer affected by the power.

Creature. You can try to move a Huge or smaller creature. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, you move la créature up to 30 mètres in any direction, including upward but not beyond the range of this power. Until the end of your next turn, la créature is entravé in your telekinetic grip. A creature lifted upward is suspended in mid-air.

On subsequent rounds, you can use your action to attempt to maintain your telekinetic grip on la créature by repeating the contest.

Object. You move an object that isn't being worn or carried and weighs up to 2,500 lbs up to 30 mètres in any direction, but not beyond the range of this power.

You can exert fine control on objects with your telekinetic grip, such as manipulating a simple tool, opening a door or a container, stowing or retrieving an item from an open container, or pouring the contents from a vial.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, the maximum object weight increases by 2,500 lbs for every slot niveau above 5th.

Force Vision.name: Force Vision
Force Vision.description:
You receive a vision of the future through the Force, giving you or one willing creature you can see within range a chance to change fate. When the chosen creature makes an test de caractéristique, an attack roll, or a jet de sauvegarde before the power ends, it can dismiss this power on itpersonnelle to roll an additional [[/r d20]] and choose which of the d20s to use. Alternatively, when an attack roll is made against the chosen creature, it can dismiss this power on itpersonnelle to roll a [[/r d20]] and choose which of the d20s to use, the one it rolled or the one the attacker rolled.

If the original [[/r d20]] roll has avantage or disavantage, la créature rolls the additional [[/r d20]] after avantage or disavantage has been applied to the original roll.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot niveau above 2nd.

Master Saber Throw.name: Lancer de sabre maître
Master Saber Throw.description:
Prerequisite: Greater Saber Throw

When you cast this power, you must be wielding at least one lightweapon or vibroweapon, otherwise the power fails. When you cast this power, you can throw two weapons, striking creatures in two lines originating from yourpersonnelle, both 90 mètres long and 5 mètres wide, or you can throw one weapon in a 90-foot long, 5-foot wide line de votre choix originating from yourpersonnelle and change its direction to move in a second identical line de votre choix within range. Each creature in a line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 5d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts and [[/r 5d8]] force dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature in the area of more than one line is affected only once. The weapons then immediately return to your hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 8 or higher, the weapon dégâts and force dégâts each increase by [[/r 1d8]] for each slot niveau above 7th.

Mind Trick.name: Astuce mentale
Mind Trick.description:
Choose a target within range that isn't hostile toward you. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible has disavantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Intelligence (Investigation) checks.

On a successful sauvegarde, la créature realizes that you tried to use the Force to influence its awareness and becomes hostile toward you. A creature à terre to violence might attack you. Another creature might seek retribution in other ways (at the GM's discretion), depending on the nature of your interaction with it. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.

Dark Shear.name: Cisaillement sombre
Dark Shear.description:
You create a weapon of imperceptible Force energy that lasts until the power ends. It counts as a simple lightweapon with which you are proficient. It deals [[/r 2d6]] psychic dégâts, and has the finesse, light, and thrown properties (range 20/60). When you attack while within dim light or darkness, you have avantage.

If you drop the weapon or throw it, it disappears at the end of the turn. While the power lasts, you can use a action bonus to make the weapon reappear in your hand.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a 3rd or niveau 4 force slot, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] ([[/r 3d6]]). At 5th or niveau 6, the dégâts increases by [[/r 2d6]] ([[/r 4d6]]). At niveau 7 or higher, the dégâts increases by [[/r 3d6]] ([[/r 5d6]]).

Force Meld.name: Force Meld
Force Meld.description:
Prerequisite: Force Whisper

You forge a telepathic link among up to eight willing creatures de votre choix within range, psychically linking chaque créature to all the others for the duration. Droids, constructs, and creatures with Intelligence scores of 2 or less aren't affected by this power.

Until the power ends, la cibles can communicate telepathically through the bond whether or not they have a common language. The communication is possible over any distance, though it can't extend beyond a single planet.

Slow Descent.name: Descente lente
Slow Descent.description: Choose up to five falling creatures within range. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60 mètres per round until the power ends. If la créature lands before the power ends, it takes no falling dégâts and can land on its mètres, and the power ends for cette créature.

Saber Slash.name: Coup de sabre
Saber Slash.description:
Prerequisite: Saber Strike

You move in a burst of speed to deliver a deadly blow. When you cast this power, you must be wielding a melee weapon with which you are proficient, otherwise, the power fails. As part of the action used to cast this power, you move in a straight line to an unoccupied space within the power's range and strike a creature within your weapon's range. Opportunity attacks provoked by this movement have disavantage. The creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes dégâts equal to three rolls of the weapon's dégâts dice + [[/r 4d4]] force dégâts, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 4 or higher, the force dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] for each slot niveau above 3rd.

Resistance.name: Résistance
Resistance.description:
Vous contactez une créature consentante. Une fois avant la fin du pouvoir, la cible peut lancer un [[/r d4]] et ajouter le numéro obtenu à un jet de sauvegarde de son choix. Le pouvoir prend alors fin.

Le dé de ce pouvoir augmente aux niveaux supérieurs : jusqu'à un [[/r d6]] au niveau 5, un [[/r d8]] au niveau 11 et un [[/r d10]] au niveau 17.

.

Force Chain Lightning.name: Force Chain Lightning
Force Chain Lightning.description:
Prerequisite: Force Lightning

You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target de votre choix that you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from cette cible to as many as three other targets, each of which must be within 30 mètres of the first target. A target can be a creature or an object and can be targeted by only one of the bolts.

A target must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. La cible takes [[/r 10d8]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 7 or higher, one additional bolt leaps from the first target to another target for each slot niveau above 6th.

Master Revitalize.name: Maître Revitaliser
Master Revitalize.description:
Prerequisite: Improved Revitalize

You return a dead creature you contact to life, provided that it has been dead no longer than 1 day. If la créature's soul is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the body, la créature returns to life with all its points de vie. This power has no effect on droids or constructs.
