This power closes all wounds, neutralizes any poison, cures all diseases, and lifts any curses affecting la créature when it died. The power replaces dégâtsd or missing organs and limbs.

Curse.name: Malédiction
Curse.description:
Prérequis : Dénonciation

Jusqu'à trois créatures de votre choix que vous pouvez voir à portée doivent effectuer un jet de sauvegarde de Charisme. La première fois à chaque tour, une cible qui échoue à ce jet de sauvegarde effectue un jet d'attaque ou un jet de sauvegarde avant la fin du pouvoir, la cible doit lancer un [[/r d4]] et soustraire le nombre obtenu du jet d'attaque ou du jet de sauvegarde. un emplacement de force de niveau 3 ou supérieur, vous pouvez cibler une créature supplémentaire tous les deux niveaux d'emplacement au-dessus du 1er. Lorsque vous lancez ce pouvoir au niveau 3, 6 ou 9, le dé passe respectivement à [[/r d6]], [[/r d8]] et [[/r d10]].

Wall of Light.name: Mur de Lumière
Wall of Light.description:
You conjure an immense manifestation of destructive light side Force energy. The wall appears within range and lasts for the duration. Vous pouvez faire a straight wall up to 100 mètres long, 20 mètres high, and 5 mètres thick, or a ringed wall up to 60 mètres in diameter, 20 mètres high, and 5 mètres thick. The wall provides three-quarters cover and its space is difficult terrain.

When a creature enters the wall's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 6d10]] force dégâts, or half as much on a success.

Mass Animation.name: Animation de masse
Mass Animation.description:
Prerequisite: Animate Weapon

You snag several objects using the Force and whip them into the air around you, controlling them to attack at your command. Choose up to ten unenhanced objects within range that are not being worn or carried. Medium targets count as two objects, Large targets count as four objects, Huge targets count as eight objects. You can't control any object larger than Huge. Each object animates and hovers near you, remaining within 100 mètres of you for the duration. An animated object behaves as though it is a construct, with AC, points de vie, and attacks determined by its size, and a flying speed of 30 mètres.

As a action bonus, you can mentally direct any object controlled by this power. If you control multiple objects, you can command any or all of them at the same time. You decide what action the object will take and where it will move. The objects act at the end of your turn. If you command an object to attack, it can make a single attaque au corps à corps against a creature within 5 mètres of it. It makes a slam attack with an attack bonus and kinetic dégâts determined by its size.

|Size| HP| AC| Attack|

|:--|:--:|:--:|:--:|

|Tiny |20|16|+6 to hit, [[/r 1d4 + 3]] dégâts|

|Small |25|15|+6 to hit, [[/r 1d8 + 2]] dégâts|

|Medium |40|13|+5 to hit, [[/r 2d6 + 1]] dégâts|

|Large |50|10|+6 to hit, [[/r 2d10 + 2]] dégâts|

|Huge |80|10|+8 to hit, [[/r 2d12 + 4]] dégâts|

Force Potency. If you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 6 or higher, you can animate two additional objects for each slot niveau above 5th.

Wakefulness.name: Vigilance
Wakefulness.description:
Prerequisite: Breath Control

You use the Force to control your body's functions. For the duration, you gain the following benefits:

  • You ignore the effects of any niveaus of épuisement you have.
  • You do not need to eat, drink, or sleep. You can't be forced to sleep by any means. To gain the benefits of a repos long, you can spend all 8 hours doing light activity, such as reading and keeping watch.

If you still have any niveaus of épuisement when this power ends, you must make a DD 15 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, you gain one additional niveau of épuisement.

Fear.name: Peur
Fear.description: You awaken the sense of mortality in une créature you can see within range. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or become effrayé for the duration. A target with 25 points de vie or fewer makes the jet de sauvegarde with disavantage. A effrayé creature can repeat this sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns, ending this effect on a success. This power has no effect on constructs or droids.

Instinctive Movement.name: Mouvement instinctif
Instinctive Movement.description:
Prerequisite: Wall Run

You enhance your movement with the Force, allowing you to traverse your environment with speed and acrobatic grace. When you cast this power, you gain two speed points. When you cast the power and as a action bonus on subsequent turns, you can expend a speed point, granting yourpersonnelle all of the following benefits until the end of that turn:

  • Your speed increases by 5 mètres.
  • You have resistance to falling dégâts.
  • You ignore difficult terrain.
  • You have a climb speed equal to your walking speed.
  • You add 10 mètres to your long jump distance and 3 mètres to your high jump distance.
  • You can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving your hands free.
  • You do not sink when moving over soft or brittle terrain, such as dust, silt, mud, snow, or thin ice. Cet effet does not allow you to move across liquid surfaces.
  • If you move at least 20 mètres straight toward a creature and then hit it with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps for the first time on the same turn, you deal an extra [[/r 1d4]] dégâts with that attack.

At the end of the turn, the benefits fade entirely until you spend another speed point. If these benefits end while you are still on a vertical surface, or anywhere else where you would normally fall or sink, you immediately fall or begin to sink unless you have some other means to remain there.

This power ends when its duration expires, when you cast this power again, or when you have spent all your speed points. When the power ends, any unspent speed points are lost.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 2 or higher, the extra dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] for each slot niveau above 1st. De plus, if you cast this power with a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, you gain one additional speed point for every two slot niveaus above 1st.

Freedom of Movement.name: Liberté de mouvement
Freedom of Movement.description:
You contact a willing creature. Its movement is unaffected by difficult terrain, and powers and enhanced effects can't reduce its speed or cause it to be paralysé or entravé.

La cible can spend 5 mètres of movement to automatically escape from unenhanced restraints. De plus, being underwater imposes no penalties on its movement or attacks.

Animate Weapon.name: Animer une arme
Animate Weapon.description:
Prerequisite: Force Disarm

You select a light- or vibro-weapon within this power's range that is not worn or carried by a conscious creature other than you, and use the Force to cause it to levitate, acting as an extension of your will for the duration or until you cast this power again. When you use this power, you can cause the weapon to move up to 20 mètres and make a melee force attack against a creature within 5 mètres of it. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] + your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique dégâts. The type is of the normal dégâts dealt by the weapon.

While the weapon is animated, on each of your turns you can use a action bonus to move the weapon up to 20 mètres and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 mètres of it. At any time, you can end this pouvoir de la Force to return the animated weapon to your hand.

An enemy can attempt to gain control of the weapon by using its action to make a Strength (Athletics) check against your force sauvegarde DD. On a success, la créature gains control of the weapon and the power ends.

Force Potency. When you cast this power using a force slot of niveau 3 or higher, the weapon's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d8]] for every two slot niveaus above 2nd.

Maddening Darkness.name: Ténèbres exaspérantes
Maddening Darkness.description:
Prerequisite: Shroud of Darkness

Terrifying darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 60-foot-radius sphere until the power ends. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness. Unenhanced light, as well as light created by powers of niveau 8 or lower, can't illuminate the area.

Shrieks, gibbering, and mad laughter can be heard within the sphere. Whenever a creature starts its turn in the sphere, it must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 8d8]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.
